title: Client Follow-Up Caller – Home Services (Canadian Company)
description:
Client Follow-Up Caller – Home Services (Canadian Company)

We’re a growing exterior home services company based in Southern Ontario, Canada. We offer premium house washing and permanent lighting installations. We’re looking for a friendly, confident, and reliable caller to help us follow up on open quotes, reach out to new leads, and reconnect with past clients to book more jobs.

This is a part-time remote role with the potential to grow into full-time as the business grows.

What You’ll Be Doing

 • Calling past clients to rebook seasonal services (house washing, etc.)

 • Following up on open quotes to answer questions and help close bookings

 • Reaching out to new leads to book in-person quotes

 • Sending follow-up texts or
s when clients don’t answer

 • Keeping records of call outcomes and updating our client list

 • Reporting regularly on calls made, quotes booked, and jobs booked

You’re a Great Fit If You

 • Speak clear, confident English on the phone

 • Are comfortable making outbound calls to warm leads and past clients (no cold calling)

 • Are self-motivated and reliable with minimal supervision

 • Have experience in a customer service, sales, or VA role

 • Have a quiet workspace and a stable internet connection

Compensation

 • $2 per in-person quote booked

 • $10 per job booked

 • Hourly base to be discussed with the right candidate

 • Part-time hours — approximately 10 to 20 hours per week

Details

 • Remote — Philippines based

 • Flexible hours within Canadian business hours (Eastern Time)

 • Long-term position with a stable, growing company



To Apply

Please send a short voice recording (1 to 2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you’d be great at this role. Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Remote Virtual Assistant (Medical Aesthetics / Lead Generation Focus)
description:
Title



Remote Virtual Assistant (Medical Aesthetics / Lead Generation Focus)



Overview



Divine Rejuvenation is a growing NP-led medical aesthetics clinic based in California, specializing in injectables, weight loss, and wellness services.



We are seeking a high-performing Virtual Assistant to support lead generation, marketing execution, website updates, and backend organization.



This is not a basic admin role.

We are looking for someone who can execute, produce results, and help grow the business.



 Primary Objective

Increase bookings, visibility, and revenue while supporting backend organization and compliance tasks.



 Key Responsibilities

Lead Generation & Marketing (Top Priority)

Manage and optimize Google Business Profile

Weekly posts (2–3)

Upload services and photos

Assist with review generation

Manage Instagram business account

3–5 posts per week

Story posting during promotions

Educational + promotional content

Assist with campaign execution:

Botox, filler, IV therapy, weight loss promotions

Ensure booking links and client flow are functioning



 Website Management

Update website using Wix:

Services, pricing, and offers

Create and optimize landing pages

Perform basic SEO updates (titles, descriptions)



Systems & Organization

Organize digital files, documents, and workflows

Upload and manage forms within Aesthetic Record (or similar systems)

Ensure backend systems are clean and functional



Client Communication Support

Respond to inquiries (non-clinical only)

Follow up with leads and existing clients

Direct clinical questions to provider



Requirements (Do Not Apply If You Do Not Meet These)

Experience working with:

Med spa, aesthetics, or healthcare businesses (preferred)

Social media marketing (Instagram)

Google Business Profile optimization

Website platforms (Wix preferred)

Strong written English communication

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented



Hours & Compensation

Part-time: 10–15 hours per week

Remote 

Compensation based on experience

Opportunity for long-term role with growth



Performance Expectations (KPIs)

Within the first 30–60 days:

Consistent weekly content posting

Improved Google Business presence

Increase in client inquiries/bookings

Organized backend systems- including Website optimization



Systems You Will Access

Aesthetic Record

Wix

Google Business Profile

Instagram



Application Instructions 

To be considered, you must include:



A brief summary of your experience with med spas, healthcare, or similar businesses

Examples of social media or Google Business profiles you have managed

A short answer to this question:

 “If a clinic has low bookings, what would you do in the first 30 days?”



Applications without these will not be considered.

title: Recruitment Resourcer
description:
Recruitment Resourcer (Full-Time)

ZenPeople is a boutique recruitment agency specialising in the Engineering, Manufacturing, and Construction sectors, supporting both white- and blue-collar roles. As our business continues to grow, we’re looking for a high-performing Recruitment Resourcer to join our team.



Key Requirements:

• Experience interviewing candidates in recruitment (preferred)

• Background in recruitment, BDM, or BPO sales (highly preferred)

• Exposure to engineering, manufacturing, or construction roles (advantage)

• Confident, personable, and relationship-driven

• Goal-oriented and motivated by commissions and performance

• Open to transitioning into a full-time role

• Coordinate interviews between clients and candidates

• Perform reference checks

• Maintain and update CRM/database

What We Offer:

• Collaborative team environment with strong admin backing

If you’re someone who takes ownership, builds strong client and candidate relationships, and thrives in a results-driven recruitment environment, this is the role for you.



Apply now by sending your resume to

title: Remote Sales Specialist (Wholesale / B2B)
description:
Remote Sales Specialist



AM Eyewear - Global



AM Eyewear, Australia’s longest-running independent fashion eyewear brand, established in 2003, is expanding its global wholesale network.



We’re looking for a highly driven Remote Sales Specialist to initiate and convert new business across Europe, the USA and Asia, working directly with leading optical retailers. If you understand premium product, can sell with confidence, and know how to turn cold outreach into long-term accounts, this is a high-reward opportunity.



This is a commission-only role designed for serious sales operators who want uncapped earning potential within an established global brand.



What You’ll Be Doing



• Proactively reach out to optical stores via cold calling and
 outreach using our extensive global database

• Introduce and position AM Eyewear as a premium, must-have brand within high-end optical environments

• Convert new wholesale partners and onboard them to our B2B ordering platform

• Build and maintain relationships with store owners and buyers

• Identify high-value accounts and develop long-term opportunities

• Ensure a smooth first order experience and handover into our system for ongoing reorders

• Represent the brand with a strong understanding of luxury positioning, materials and design



Commission Structure



• 20% commission on all first orders

(Typical first orders range between USD $2,000 – $4,000)



• 10% commission on all reorders

(Generated through accounts you initiate, for 2 years)



• First orders are supported with a 30% wholesale discount, with an ongoing 20% margin for stockists, making conversion highly attractive



What We’re Looking For



• Proven experience in sales, business development or wholesale (fashion/optical preferred)

• Confidence in cold outreach - phone and

• Strong communication and persuasion skills

• Self-motivated and comfortable working remotely

• Ability to understand and sell premium/luxury product

• Organised, consistent and results-driven



About the Brand



AM Eyewear is a globally recognised eyewear brand, stocked in over 1,000 high-end optical practices worldwide.



We are known for:

• Handcrafted frames using Italian bio-based acetate and Japanese titanium

• Premium ZEISS nylon lenses with gold AR coating

• A design-led approach blending fashion, culture and craftsmanship



This is not a startup sell, you’ll be representing a brand with strong industry credibility and demand.



What You’ll Love



• High commission structure with uncapped earning potential

• Work remotely, on your own schedule

• Sell a product that already has global recognition and demand

• Long-term earning from accounts you build



How to Apply



Send your CV and a short introduction outlining your sales experience to:





Please note: this role is suited to experienced sales professionals. Only applicants with relevant experience will be considered.

title: Appointment Setter (Consumer Protection Law)
description:
Are you a persuasive communicator who enjoys making a difference in others lives? We are a  law firm dedicated to helping real people with debt related legal issues. We aren’t looking for script-readers; we’re looking for empathetic professionals who can turn warm leads into scheduled calls.



 A Note on Authenticity: We value human connection above all else. AI-generated applications will be declined. 



*Key Responsibilities*

This is not cold calling. You will be speaking with individuals who have called us or opted-in through our advertisements and are actively seeking help. Your mission is to qualify their situation, confirm they are someone we can help, empathize, and schedule them for a call with an attorney.

High-Volume Engagement: Manage 100+ outbound calls per day using our power dialer.

Lead Qualification: Use our question-based framework to discover pain points and identify viable legal cases.

Objection Handling: Confidently navigate concerns regarding privacy and the legal process.

KPI Management: Meet daily targets for dials, utilization rates, and signup conversions.



*Requirements & Qualifications*

Experience: 1+ years of high-volume phone sales (Legal, Banking, or Insurance experience is a major plus).

Language: Exceptional, fluent English is mandatory. You must have a natural, conversational tonality. Spanish speaking is preferred but not required.

Results Driven: You thrive in performance-based environments and are motivated by hitting (and exceeding) targets.

Resilience: You hear "I want to think about it" and view it as the start of the conversation, not the end.

Tech Savvy: You are comfortable navigating a modern sales stack. While we provide training, prior experience with the following tools is a significant advantage:

CRMs & Automation: GoHighLevel and Lawcus.

Communication Suites: PhoneBurner (Power Dialer) and Zoom.

Documentation: Proficiency with Docusign for securing client retainers.



*Compensation & Culture*

Stable Hourly Pay + Performance Bonuses: Your earning potential is directly tied to your results. The better you perform, the more you take home.

Productivity-Focused: This is not a "clock in, clock out" corporate job. We pay for active, productive hours spent dialing, following up, and onboarding clients.

Growth & Support: You will be trained and supported by a team that wants to see you thrive.

Shift: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST (We offer some flexibility for the right candidate).



*How to Apply*

To be considered, please provide your resume and video recording with answers to the following questions. Do not use AI for these answers—we want to see your personality! Note: we prefer a conversational tonality.

Introduction Video: Please send a short video (Loom or Google Drive) introducing yourself. First, tell us why you’re a great fit and detail your past sales results and KPIs. 



Then include responses to the following questions:

Objection Handling (Part 1): A prospect says, “I just want to know how much the services cost.” How would you handle this?

Objection Handling (Part 2): A prospect says, “I’ve been burned before, I don’t know what’s wrong with my credit, and I don’t even know if this is worth it.” How do you respond?

Resilience: You’ve made 90 calls today and nobody has picked up. What is your next move?

Motivation: Why are you specifically seeking a performance-based sales role?

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



Voax Media is a performance network serving the US pay-per-call and lead generation market. We connect advertisers and publishers across Insurance, Home Services, and Financial Services, with full campaign visibility on both sides of the transaction.



We are early. We are intentional about who we bring in. This is our first publisher facing hire, and we need someone who has actually done this work, not someone who is figuring it out alongside us.



If you have real experience managing publisher and affiliate relationships in pay-per-call or performance marketing, and you want to be a foundational part of building something from the ground up, this is the role.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Recruit and onboard publishers and call centers sending inbound call traffic in Insurance, Home Services, and Financial Services

- Manage day-to-day publisher relationships: payout negotiations, performance reviews, traffic quality conversations

- Monitor publisher performance using our call tracking platform and flag traffic quality issues before they become billing disputes

- Identify new publisher sources and expand our supply across active verticals

- Work directly with the CEO to align publisher supply with active advertiser demand

- Own publisher communication: onboarding, updates, campaign changes, and escalations



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Direct experience at a performance network, pay-per-call network, or affiliate network, not general digital marketing

- Hands-on publisher or affiliate account management, not just campaign operations

- Familiarity with inbound call or live transfer campaigns and how they are structured and priced

- Experience working with US-based publishers or traffic partners

- Working knowledge of Trackdrive or a comparable call tracking platform

- Clear, direct communicator — able to manage relationships, resolve disputes, and hold publishers accountable without burning them

- Available to work hours that overlap with US business hours



WHAT WE OFFER



- Competitive base salary

- Performance-based commission structure. Your income grows as the publisher network grows

- Fully remote

- Direct access to leadership — no layers, no bureaucracy

- A role that matters from day one. You are not joining a team of 40 affiliate managers. You are building the function.

title: Loan Data Analyst (Credit Decisioning Focus)
description:
About the Role



We are an Australian-based private lender seeking a highly detail-oriented Loan Data Analyst with experience working alongside credit decisioning frameworks or rule books.



This role goes beyond basic data review — you will play a key part in structuring financial data in line with credit policy, ensuring our assessors can make fast, consistent, and responsible lending decisions.



Key Responsibilities



• Review and analyse customer bank transaction data (last 90 days)

• Categorise income, expenses, and liabilities in line with internal credit rules

• Apply and interpret credit policy / rulebook guidelines to real customer data

• Identify financial behaviours such as:



Gambling activity

BNPL usage

Payday lending / wage advances

Overdraft reliance

• Prepare clear, structured summaries aligned to decisioning requirements

• Flag inconsistencies, risks, or policy breaches for escalation

• Support continuous improvement of credit rules and data structuring processes

• Maintain strict privacy, confidentiality, and data handling standards

What We’re Looking For



• Experience working with credit rulebooks, decisioning frameworks, or lending policies

• Background in lending, fintech, credit risk, or financial data analysis

• Strong understanding of:



Income verification

Expense analysis

Liability assessment

Responsible lending principles

• Proven ability to identify patterns, anomalies, and risk indicators in transaction data

• High attention to detail and structured thinking

• Ability to follow and apply rules consistently (not just interpret data)

• Strong written English and ability to present clear, logical summaries

Important – Privacy & Data Handling



You will be working with sensitive financial data. All work must be completed in line with strict privacy and confidentiality requirements.

No customer data is to be stored, shared, or used outside of authorised systems.



Application Requirement (Mandatory)



To be considered for this role, you must provide:



A sample of a credit rulebook, decisioning framework, or policy you have previously worked with

This can be anonymised or redacted if required

It should demonstrate how decisions are made (e.g. income rules, expense thresholds, risk flags)

Examples of categorised transaction data, ensuring:

All personal information is removed or anonymised

No real customer names, account numbers, or identifiable details

Clear grouping of transactions (e.g. income, rent, utilities, gambling, BNPL, discretionary spending)



Applications without these examples will not be considered.



Why Join Us?



• Work with a fast-growing Australian lender building a scalable credit model

• Be part of a structured, data-driven decisioning environment

• Long-term opportunity with growth into credit risk and policy development

• High-impact role influencing how lending decisions are made

title: IT Audit Associate CISA
description:
We are looking for an IT Audit Associate with an active CISA certification to join our SOC 2 attestation practice. This role strengthens the firm’s IT audit competence by bringing formal information systems audit training and methodology to our evidence review and control evaluation processes. You will work alongside our evidence review team and the engagement partner to evaluate the design and operating effectiveness of controls across the trust services criteria.



This is a hands-on role. You will review technical evidence, assess control environments for startup-stage service organizations, identify exceptions and deviations, and help ensure our engagement files meet professional standards. You will also contribute to the firm’s internal quality by helping develop and deliver SOC 2 methodology training for the broader team and supporting our inspection and monitoring processes.



Required Qualifications

•  Active CISA (Certified Information Systems Auditor) certification in good standing with ISACA

•  Minimum 3 years of experience in information systems auditing, IT controls, or information security (consistent with CISA experience requirements)

•  Familiarity with SOC 2 examinations, AICPA Trust Services Criteria, or SSAE attestation standards

•  Working knowledge of cloud infrastructure (AWS required; GCP, Azure, or DigitalOcean a plus) including IAM, networking, logging, and security services

•  Understanding of IT general controls: access management, change management, operations, and physical/logical security

•  Available to work 40 hours per week during U.S. business hours (core hours overlap required; flexible within Eastern, Central, or Pacific time)

•  Strong written communication skills — you will document findings, draft workpapers, and write assessment memos that need to withstand peer review scrutiny

•  Ability to work independently within a structured methodology while knowing when to escalate

title: Bookkeeper for Canadian E-Commerce Brand
description:
ABOUT US

We're a Canadian DTC tea brand and sell through our Shopify store. We ship to the US and Canada from warehouses in both countries.



We're a startup and currently mid-six figures in annual revenue and growing. We transact in both USD and CAD, with most sales in USD.



We want to transition from an automated bookkeeping tool (Finaloop) to QuickBooks Online and looking for a detail-oriented bookkeeper to own our books going forward. We're looking for someone who wants to build a long-term relationship and grow with us - not a short-term gig.



THE SCOPE

Phase One: Catchup & Cleanup (First 1-2 Months)

You'll start by reconciling and cleaning up our books for the current year so far. This includes setting up a clean chart of accounts in QuickBooks Online, importing historical transactions, and getting everything reconciled and audit-ready.



Phase Two: Ongoing Monthly Management

Once the books are clean, this transitions into a long-term monthly role covering everything below.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Transaction Management

- Categorize and reconcile all bank and credit card transactions in QuickBooks Online

- Reconcile Shopify payouts against actual orders and refunds

- Reconcile multi-currency accounts (USD + CAD) - you must ensure the bank balance in QBO matches the statement exactly, including handling exchange rate differences

- Match and track Meta 
/Instagram) ad spend invoices against bank withdrawals

- Process and track expenses - supplier invoices, 3PL fees, freight, customs charges, software subscriptions

- Ensure every transaction has proper supporting documentation



Canadian Tax Compliance

- Prepare and file quarterly GST/HST returns

- Match receipts and invoices to maximize input tax credits (ITCs)

- Track provincial sales tax obligations

- Track US sales tax exposure (we use Shopify's auto-tax, but you'll verify)



Monthly Reporting

- Prepare monthly Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow statements

- Flag anomalies, unusual charges, or budget variances

- Provide financial clarity to founders - not just numbers, but what they mean



Inventory & COGS

- Track landed costs (product cost + ocean freight + customs duties + warehousing)

- Maintain accurate COGS records aligned with inventory movements

- Reconcile inventory valuation quarterly



Expense Tracking

- Track recurring software costs

- Track supplier invoices, 3PL fees, freight, and customs charges

- Ensure all expenses are properly categorized and documented



Year-End

- Prepare working papers and schedules for our CPA/accountant

- Support annual corporate tax return preparation

- Prepare any required slips



REQUIRED TECH STACK (Do Not Apply Without This Experience)



- QuickBooks Online - Expert level. This is non-negotiable.

- Multi-Currency Banking  - We operate in USD and CAD. You must have experience reconciling multi-currency accounts and handling exchange rates so the bank balance in QBO matches the statement to the penny.

- Shopify - Experience reconciling Shopify payouts to QBO.

- Google SheetS - Comfortable with ad-hoc reports and collaboration.



REQUIREMENTS

Must Have:

- 3+ years of bookkeeping experience using QuickBooks Online

- Experience with Canadian GST/HST filing and input tax credits

- Experience with e-commerce businesses (Shopify strongly preferred)

- Experience reconciling multi-currency accounts (USD + CAD)

- Strong attention to detail - we have zero tolerance for sloppy entries

- Fluent in English with strong written communication



Nice to Have:

- Experience with DTC or subscription-based businesses

- Experience with inventory accounting and landed cost tracking

- Previous experience transitioning a company from another system onto QuickBooks



HOURS & COMPENSATION

- Part-time to start - most likely 10-20 hours a month as we're still a small business, but expect it to grow as we scale

- Schedule: Flexible, but must have overlap with Pacific Time for communication

- Rate: $5–$10 USD/hour depending on experience

- Long-term: We want someone who grows with us. This is not a one-off project.



WHAT THIS ROLE IS

- A key financial support role for a growing e-commerce brand

- Someone who brings order, accuracy, and visibility to our finances



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT



- Not basic data entry

- Not a once-a-month check-in

- Not suitable for someone who needs constant direction



HOW TO APPLY

We ignore generic cover letters. To show us you've read this posting and have the attention to detail we need, please follow these steps:



**Step 1:** Start your message with the word TEA.



**Step 2:** In your message, answer the following questions:



**Question A:** We use multi-currency banking (USD and CAD). How do you handle the exchange rate difference in QBO when reconciling a multi-currency account to ensure the bank balance matches the statement?



**Question B:** We receive Shopify payouts approximately 3 times per week. Each payout bundles sales, refunds, fees, and adjustments. How would you reconcile these in QBO? Walk us through your approach.



**Question C:** What is your experience with Canadian GST/HST input tax credits? Give us a specific example of how you've maximized ITCs for a previous client.



**Step 3:** Include the following:

- A short intro about yourself and your bookkeeping experience

- Your experience with e-commerce / Shopify businesses specifically

- Your expected monthly rate in PHP

- Your available hours and timezone

- Your QuickBooks Online proficiency self-rating (1-10)



Applications that do not answer the screening questions will not be considered. We value accuracy, initiative, and clear communication.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Medical Billing
description:
ABOUT CLAIM N BILLING

Claim N Billing is a U.S.-based medical billing and revenue cycle management (RCM) company serving healthcare providers — including private practice physicians, specialty clinics, and independent medical offices. We handle end-to-end billing so providers can focus on patient care. We are growing and need a driven SDR to consistently bring in new provider accounts.



ROLE OVERVIEW

You will own the top of our sales funnel. Your job is to identify, prospect, and book qualified discovery calls for the owner (closer). This is a full-time, remote role requiring confident English communication and a proven track record in B2B outbound sales — preferably targeting healthcare or professional services.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

- Research and build targeted prospect lists (independent physicians, group practices, specialty clinics, urgent care centers, chiropractors, physical therapists, mental health providers)

- Execute daily outbound cold calls and cold
s to decision-makers (practice owners, office managers, billing managers)

- Log all activity and update CRM daily (HubSpot or similar)

- Hit weekly KPIs: 50+ dials/day, 100+
s/day, 5+ booked calls/week

- Provide weekly performance reports to the owner



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- 2+ years of B2B cold calling and
 outreach experience (healthcare, medical billing, SaaS, or insurance preferred)

- Excellent spoken and written English — must be comfortable calling U.S.-based medical offices and practice managers

- Strong, professional phone presence — confident, empathetic, and persistent

- Basic understanding of medical billing, RCM, or healthcare administration is a strong plus

- Highly organized and self-motivated — able to work independently

- Familiar with CRM tools (HubSpot, Zoho, or similar)

- Experience with 
, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or ZoomInfo is a plus

- Available to work U.S. business hours (Pacific or Mountain Time preferred)



COMPENSATION

- Performance bonus: $50–$150 per closed client account (paid monthly)

- Total OTE: $900–$1,400+/month for strong performers



WHY WORK WITH US

- Direct access to the owner — fast decisions, no corporate red tape

- Monthly performance bonuses — your results directly determine your income

- Long-term opportunity to grow into a Sales Lead role as we expand

- Stable, U.S.-based company with a solid operational track record in medical billing



TO APPLY

title: Finance & Office Manager
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing Australian-based accounting and financial services group seeking a capable Finance & Office Manager to manage internal finance and office operations across our group of businesses.



Our group operates across multiple divisions including bookkeeping, tax, finance broking, real estate, and global talent services. As the business continues to grow, we are looking for someone who can take ownership of iinternal operational matters, ensuring that the firm runs efficiently behind the scenes.



This role will manage the firm’s internal finance, office administration, compliance coordination, and practice management processes, allowing the leadership team to focus on client service and business growth.



The ideal candidate will have strong accounting capability, excellent organisational skills, and the ability to manage multiple internal functions simultaneously.



This position reports to the Operations Manager and works closely with internal teams to ensure smooth daily operations across the organisation. This role is expected to take ownership of all internal operational matters of the firm, including internal finance, office administration, compliance coordination, telecommunications management, marketing coordination, and practice management.



The Finance & Office Manager will work closely with the Operations Manager to ensure internal systems run efficiently and that the organisation operates in a structured and well-managed manner.



As the business continues to grow, the successful candidate will have the opportunity to build and manage internal processes and support functions, helping strengthen the operational backbone of the group.



Key Responsibilities

1. Internal Finance Management

Oversee internal financial administration across group entities, including:

• Bank reconciliations across group companies

• Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable management

• Internal billing administration and monitoring

• Expense tracking and cost monitoring

• Payroll administration support and superannuation coordination

• Supporting end-of-month financial administration including revenue tracking, gross profit monitoring and expense allocation

• Inter-company cross charges and internal allocations

• Supporting internal financial reporting preparation

• Supporting quarterly compliance preparation (BAS, IAS and related reporting)



2. Office Management

Manage internal office operations and administrative systems to ensure smooth day-to-day business operations.

Responsibilities include:

• Office administration and operational coordination

• Telecommunications management (phone systems, internet services and providers)

• Office facilities and vendor coordination

• Office systems administration and operational procedures

• Supporting internal office team coordination

• Monitoring administrative workflow efficiency

• Maintaining organised operational documentation and records



3. Marketing & Internal Coordination

Support internal marketing and communication coordination.

This includes:

• Coordinating marketing administration and campaign activities

• Supporting internal marketing initiatives

• Maintaining marketing materials and documentation

• Coordinating with external marketing partners when required

• Supporting internal communication initiatives



4. Compliance & Practice Management

Support internal governance and operational compliance across the firm.

Responsibilities include:

• Maintaining internal compliance calendars

• Coordinating annual administration including insurance renewals, workers compensation administration and internal compliance tracking

• Supporting practice management systems and processes

• Ensuring internal documentation and procedures remain organised and up to date



Reporting Structure

This role reports to the Operations Manager and works closely with internal teams to manage the firm’s internal finance and office operations.

The Finance & Office Manager will play an important role in ensuring all internal matters of the firm are properly managed and organised, supporting the overall efficiency of the business.



Requirements

• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance

• Minimum 2 years accounting or bookkeeping experience

• Strong understanding of bookkeeping and financial administration

• Excellent organisational and coordination skills

• Strong attention to detail and accountability

• Ability to manage multiple internal operational responsibilities

• Proficiency with accounting software and Microsoft 365 / Google Workspace

• Strong written and verbal communication skills

• Demonstrated ability to take ownership of internal processes and improve operational systems will be highly regarded



Why Join Us

Our group is a growing multi-disciplinary business with strong 
ntum.



This role offers:

• Exposure to internal finance and operational management

• Opportunity to develop into a senior internal management role as the business expands

• Hands-on involvement across multiple businesses and industries

• Long-term career opportunities within an expanding organisation

title: Looking for a skilled Graphic Designer and Virtual Assistant
description:
I am a nutrition/fitness/foodie content creator looking for a skilled reliable graphic designer and virtual assistant. My accounts in case you wanted to check them out on 
 @CalvinCravesFood



Key roles

- Graphic design involving thumbnails, photography editing, posts, infographics, powerpoint design, website design, ebook design, etc. Anything graphic design related.

- You need to know how to do graphic design creatively without using AI. I want you to be well versed in AI and I encourage you to use it as an aid, but I prefer AI-less designs.

- Basic admin/virtual assistant related tasks. These tasks change every single week. I give clear instructions. They’re never too complicated, think spellchecking, appointment booking, copy/paste, sending messages, making excel sheets, organizing, sorting
s, brand/market research, video summarizing, blog upload, calendar booking,
 scheduling, etc.



Requirements

- Reliable internet

- A good eye for design

- Understanding of American culture/humor

- Experienced w/ common tools, softwares, and AI

- Speaks English well. I send instructions through loom videos and google drive

- Great communicator

- Reliable hard worker



Currently, this position asks you dedicate 20 hours per week (up to 4 hours per day, 5 days a week). Some days will have plenty of work. Other days, you will have no work. Regardless, you must commit to having the hours available in case there is work assigned for a particular day. Once hired, you will be sending a quick report at the end of each work day going over how you spent your 4 hours each day. I am lenient and understanding if certain things unexpectedly take longer or if emergencies occasionally come up, but I will not tolerate chronic procrastination.



Benefits

- Growth opportunities: I have experience working with other virtual assistants. If you do exceptional work and meet deadlines consistently, I will increase your pay.

- Reliable work: You will have work each week. Even if you just do 1 simple task, you will get paid the full amount through Wise every 2 weeks.

- Reliable pay: I always pay my editors on time and continually. My business is well established and I’m not a fan of delegating to AI, so you’ll never lose your job to the robots if you work for me, assuming you continue to meet expectations.

- Flexibility: You can work whichever hours you prefer, but you must dedicate 4 hours per day, 5 days a week to work.

- Easy boss: I am easy to work with and communicate with. If you need a vacation or need to communicate anything, just let me know ahead of time.



To apply, send me an
 
 that includes the word “creatine” in the subject line so I know you read everything. In the
, include any resume/portfolio of your graphic design work, photo editing, and virtual assistant experience. Feel free to type me a short message of anything else you’d like me to know about you.



If I think you might be a good match, I will
 you back with a few test projects to see how well you do on them. Please be patient as there will be many applicants, so it might take me 1-2 weeks to
 you back. But once you receive my test projects, I do expect them done within 24-48 hours.

title: Virtual Assistant: Scheduler/ Office Administrator
description:
Job Description for Philia Home Care

Remote Care Operations & Recruiting Coordinator

Philippines-Based | Independent Contractor | Remote



Philia Home Care is a licensed, woman-owned home care agency based in Washington, DC, proudly serving clients since 2014. We provide compassionate, high-quality in-home care to adults of all ages. This is a fully remote, independent contractor position based in the Philippines. The successful candidate will work US Eastern Time hours and serve as a critical back-office support member of our care operations and recruiting team.



About the Role

This role supports two core functions: care operations scheduling and caregiver recruiting. You will work closely with our US-based scheduling and operations team, helping ensure that caregivers are confirmed, schedules are accurate, and new caregiver applicants move efficiently through our hiring process. You will be trained on our care management platform (AxisCare) and our AI scheduling system (Phoebe).



Care Operations Support

• Maintain accurate caregiver and scheduling records in AxisCare, our care management platform.

• Monitor and support Phoebe (our AI scheduling system), ensuring caregiver shift confirmations and call-out coverage communications are handled promptly and accurately.

• Follow up with caregivers to confirm upcoming shifts, obtain responses on open shifts, and update schedule records accordingly.

• Document all caregiver communications and scheduling changes in the care management system.

• Enter detailed, structured caregiver profile notes into AxisCare using a provided rubric, capturing availability, skills, client preferences, and reliability history.

• Provide compliance follow-up to caregivers regarding outstanding documentation, certifications, or training requirements.

• Work US Eastern Time hours. Some flexibility for early evening coverage may be required.

• Follow all established Philia policies, procedures, and guidelines.



Recruiting Support

• Contact caregiver applicants in our applicant tracking system (Apploi) to guide them through the application process, answer questions, and collect required documents.

• Conduct structured phone screen interviews with applicants using a provided script to assess basic qualifications, availability, and communication skills.

• Obtain professional references from applicants and document responses.

• Perform data entry of applicant and new hire information into AxisCare and Apploi accurately and completely.

• Follow up persistently with candidates on outstanding compliance documents (background check authorization, certifications, ID, etc.).

• Schedule and confirm caregiver orientations, sending reminders and ensuring candidates are prepared to attend.

• Track applicant pipeline status and flag any gaps or issues to the supervising tea
mber.



The above list is not exhaustive. Philia is a small, mission-driven company. We value people who take initiative, ask smart questions, and help out wherever needed. Flexibility and a team-first attitude are essential.



Job Requirements

• Excellent written and spoken English communication skills — this is non-negotiable.

• Minimum 2 years of experience in a remote administrative, customer service, or healthcare support role.

• Experience working with US-based clients or employers strongly preferred.

• Highly detail-oriented with strong follow-through — you do not let things fall through the cracks.

• Comfortable working independently without constant supervision.

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional home work environment.

• Proficiency with Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Drive, Google Chat) required.

• Experience with scheduling, care management, or applicant tracking software is a strong plus.

• Ability to work US Eastern Time hours.



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree preferred.

• Experience in home care, healthcare administration, or social services is a strong plus.

• Strong computer and data entry skills with high accuracy.

• Ability to communicate professionally and compassionately with a wide variety of individuals.

• Self-starter who manages time well and prioritizes independently.

• Demonstrated reliability — we need someone we can count on every day.



What We Offer

• Fully remote, stable long-term contractor engagement.

• A supportive, mission-driven team that genuinely cares about its people.

• Opportunity to grow your role as Philia grows.

• Competitive compensation commensurate with experience.



Please use the word "Care" in the subject line of your application.

title: Sales-Oriented Customer Service Representative – NYC Mobility Rentals
description:
Customer Service & Logistics Coordinator (Phone-Based)



NYC Mobility Rentals — Remote (Philippine timezone, overlap with EST required)



Full-time $5–$8/hr DOE Phone-heavy role

ABOUT THE ROLE



NYC Mobility Rentals delivers wheelchairs, scooters, and other mobility equipment directly to hotels, residences, and Airbnbs across New York City. Our customers are often elderly guests, travelers with disabilities, or families who need equipment fast — with little room for error.



We need a sharp, energetic CS rep who can own the full customer journey: take inbound orders over the phone with confidence, coordinate deliveries with our on-ground drivers, and manage scheduling without hand-holding. This is not a passive
-support role. You will be on the phone — a lot — and you need to love it.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

Handle inbound phone calls and take rental orders end-to-end (equipment type, delivery address, timing, payment)

Coordinate delivery scheduling and logistics with NYC-based drivers in real time

Follow up on deliveries, handle last-minute changes, and resolve issues on the spot

Respond to inquiries via phone, SMS, and
 — phone is the priority

Keep booking records accurate and up to date in our rental management system

Flag operational issues proactively before they become problems

YOU'RE A FIT IF YOU

Have at least 2 years of phone-based customer service or sales experience — inbound call center, hotel reservations, travel booking, or similar

Speak and write English at a near-native level with a clear, neutral, or easily understood accent

Are naturally driven and don't wait to be told what to do — you see a problem and solve it

Stay calm and sharp when things get busy or a customer is stressed

Can manage multiple moving pieces (an order, a driver, a delayed delivery) without dropping the ball

Are available during Eastern US business hours (9 AM–6 PM EST), Monday through Saturday

Have a reliable internet connection, a headset, and a quiet space to take calls

THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF YOU

Prefer mostly chat or
 — this role is 70%+ phone

Need detailed step-by-step instructions for every situation

Are not comfortable talking to customers who are urgent, elderly, or under stress

Have had no experience coordinating time-sensitive logistics or scheduling

HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, your application must include all of the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



A 60–90 second voice recording (Vocaroo or similar) introducing yourself and answering: "A hotel concierge calls asking for a wheelchair to be delivered in 2 hours to a guest who needs it urgently. How do you handle it?"

A short written response (3–5 sentences) on the same question, typed in your application message

Your resume with relevant phone-based or logistics experience highlighted

Your available hours and your current internet setup (provider, speed, wired or WiFi)



We read every application carefully. Voice recording quality, clarity of thought, and how you present yourself in writing are all part of our evaluation. If English is not your first language, that is okay — but your communication must be clear, confident, and professional at all times on this role.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer — iOS Swift + NestJS (AI-Powered Maternal Health App)
description:
About ProMom



ProMom (promom.ai) is an AI-powered maternal health platform helping women navigate every stage of motherhood — from fertility and preconception through pregnancy and postpartum. Our features include Maia, an AI assistant that answers real-time health questions; BellySafe, an instant food and medication safety checker; a Smart Calendar for tracking milestones and appointments; and AI Finds, a curated product recommendation engine. We're live on iOS and web, growing fast, and building the most trusted companion for maternal health. Android is next. This is early-stage, high-impact work.



The Role



We're looking for a Senior Full-Stack Developer who owns both the iOS (Swift) and backend (NestJS/Node.js) sides of the product. You won't be handed pixel-perfect specs — you'll work closely with the founding team to build real features that real moms use every day. You must be a confident, independent engineer who ships.



This role requires you to be a vibe coder. That means you use Claude CLI (Claude Code by Anthropic) as a core part of your development workflow — to write, refactor, scaffold, debug, and architect code. We don't want someone who dabbles with AI tools. We want someone who has genuinely integrated Claude CLI into how they think and build. This is non-negotiable.



What You'll Do



1. Build and maintain the ProMom iOS app using Swift and SwiftUI, owning architecture, performance, and UX quality

2. Develop and extend backend services using NestJS (Node.js/TypeScript), including REST APIs, authentication, and data pipelines

3. Integrate and maintain AI features — including the Maia assistant, BellySafe safety checks, and future LLM-powered workflows

4. Own the full feature lifecycle: design discussions -> implementation -> testing -> deployment

5. Work directly with the founders to prioritize, scope, and ship features on tight timelines

6. Maintain App Store submissions, versioning, and release processes

7. Write clean, well-structured code using Claude CLI as your primary AI development accelerator — and document your approach

8. Implement and maintain push notifications, background sync, and real-time data features on iOS

9. Contribute to API design decisions and data modeling for a health-sensitive, privacy-first product

10. Proactively catch and fix bugs before users report them — own quality, don't just close tickets

11. Collaborate asynchronously with a small, distributed team; communicate clearly in writing and on video calls



Hard Requirements



- Swift / SwiftUI — 4+ years building production iOS apps, with App Store releases you can point to

- NestJS / Node.js / TypeScript — 2+ years building production-grade backend APIs in NestJS

- Claude CLI (vibe coding) — You actively use Claude Code in your daily dev workflow. You can show us, on camera, how you use it to build real things. This is required, not nice-to-have.

- Full-stack ownership — Comfortable moving between iOS and backend in the same sprint

- PST overlap — Must be available and online during US Pacific time core hours (at minimum 9am-1pm PST Mon-Fri)

- English communication — Strong written English; can write clear messages, PR descriptions, and async updates without ambiguity

- Direct hire only — You must be applying as an individual, not through an agency



Nice to Haves



- Experience with health, wellness, or consumer subscription apps

- Familiarity with HealthKit, CoreData, or CoreML

- Exposure to OpenAI, Anthropic, or other LLM API integrations

- Knowledge of HIPAA-adjacent data privacy practices

- Experience with PostgreSQL, Prisma, or similar ORM in a NestJS stack

- Prior startup experience



What We Offer



- $1,500-$2,000/month USD — paid consistently, on time

- Fully remote — work from wherever you're most productive

- Meaningful product — you're building tools that support women during some of the most important 
nts of their lives

- Real ownership — small team, real autonomy, visible impact

- AI-forward culture — we use Claude CLI, we iterate fast

- Growth — as ProMom scales, this role scales with it



How to Apply



Your application MUST include:

1. A short Loom video (3-5 minutes) — introduce yourself AND show your Claude CLI workflow live (a real project, real usage). Applications without a Loom video showing Claude CLI usage will not be reviewed.

2. Links to at least two shipped iOS apps on the App Store

3. A link to backend code you've written (GitHub or live NestJS API)

4. Your PST availability hours

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Medical Billing
description:
ABOUT CLAIM N BILLING

Claim N Billing is a U.S.-based medical billing company serving healthcare providers — including private practice physicians, specialty clinics, and independent medical offices. We handle end-to-end revenue cycle management so that providers can focus on patient care. We are growing and looking for a driven Sales Development Representative (SDR) to help us consistently bring in new provider accounts.



ROLE OVERVIEW

You will own the top of our sales funnel. Your job is to identify, prospect, and book qualified discovery calls for the owner (closer). This is a full-time, remote role requiring confident English communication and a proven track record in B2B outbound sales — preferably targeting healthcare or professional services.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

- Research and build targeted prospect lists (independent physicians, group practices, specialty clinics, urgent care centers, chiropractors, physical therapists, mental health providers)

- Execute daily outbound cold calls, cold
s and LinkedIn messages to decision-makers (practice owners, office managers, billing managers)

- Follow up persistently and professionally with leads via phone,
 and LinkedIn

- Qualify prospects and book discovery calls based on our Ideal Client Profile (ICP)

- Log all activity and update CRM daily (Salesforce)

- Hit weekly KPIs: 50+ dials/day, 100+
s/day, 5+ booked calls/week, 50 LinkedIn Connections/daily

- Provide weekly performance reports to the owner



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- 2+ years of B2B cold calling and
 outreach experience (healthcare, medical billing, SaaS, or insurance preferred)

- Excellent spoken and written English — must be comfortable calling U.S.-based medical offices and practice managers

- Strong, professional phone presence — confident, empathetic, and persistent

- Basic understanding of medical billing, RCM, or healthcare administration is a strong plus

- Highly organized and self-motivated — able to work independently without micromanagement

- Familiar with CRM tools (Salesforce, Zoho, or similar)

- Experience with lead list-building tools (Apollo.io, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, ZoomInfo, or similar) is a plus

- Available to work U.S. business hours (Pacific Time ZONE U.S.)



COMPENSATION

- Base: $350–$500/month USD (depending on experience)

- Performance bonus: $50–$150 per closed client account (paid monthly)

- Total OTE: $750–$1,400+/month for strong performers



WHY WORK WITH US

- Direct access to the owner — fast decisions, no corporate red tape

- Monthly performance bonuses — your results directly determine your income

- Long-term opportunity to grow into a Sales Lead role as we expand

- Stable, U.S.-based company with a solid operational track record in medical billing



TO APPLY

Please send a short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and describing your experience with B2B cold calling — especially any experience in healthcare or medical services sales. Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Experienced SEO Specialist (Full-Time – Remote)

title: Growth Strategy & Operations Manager
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a highly analytical, entrepreneurial, and execution-oriented Growth Strategy & Operations Manager to help drive the next phase of growth for our business.



This role sits at the intersection of strategy, finance, operations, and growth. You will work directly with leadership to identify opportunities to improve profitability, optimize operations, expand into new channels and markets, and drive better decision-making across the company.



You will own high-impact projects across cost optimization, supplier negotiations, retail and international expansion, Amazon and e-commerce performance, new product launches, and company-wide analytics.



This is an ideal role for someone who enjoys solving complex business problems, building financial models, negotiating with partners, and turning data into action.



Key Responsibilities



1. New Product Launches & Growth

Own the end-to-end process for launching new products and product lines

Evaluate, prioritize, and size new product opportunities based on market demand, competitive landscape, profitability, and operational complexity

Build launch plans covering sourcing, pricing, positioning, inventory, operations, creative, and go-to-market strategy

Work cross-functionally with PPC, supply chain, creative, operations, and leadership teams to ensure successful product launches

Track launch performance and make recommendations to improve sales, profitability, and execution

Identify opportunities to expand existing products into new bundles, variations, and adjacent categories



2. International Expansion

Lead the company’s expansion into international markets and new sales channels

Evaluate which countries and marketplaces to enter based on demand, competitive intensity, logistics, compliance, and profitability

Develop market entry strategies for new countries, including:

Pricing and unit economics

Supply chain and logistics

International fulfillment and freight

Regulatory and compliance requirements

Localization and channel strategy

Coordinate with external partners, distributors, freight forwarders, and suppliers to support international growth

Build financial models and business cases to prioritize international opportunities



3. Cross-Functional Execution & Project Management

Act as the central operator across teams to ensure key initiatives are executed effectively

Work cross-functionally with PPC, supply chain, creative, finance, operations, and leadership teams

Manage timelines, priorities, and communication across multiple projects simultaneously

Ensure teams are aligned on goals, deliverables, and deadlines

Identify roadblocks and drive solutions to keep projects moving forward

Support leadership on special projects, growth initiatives, and strategic priorities



4. Reporting, Analytics & Recommendations

Build and maintain dashboards, reporting, and executive summaries across the business

Create weekly and monthly reports covering:

Sales

Profitability

Amazon performance

Product launches

International expansion

Supply chain and inventory



Analyze Amazon and e-commerce performance, including pricing, CVR, TACOS, contribution margin, and inventory levels

Build financial models and Google Sheets / Excel analyses to support decisions

Turn data into clear recommendations and action plans for leadership

Create executive-level presentations in PowerPoint and Google Slides



What Success Looks Like



Within the first 6–12 months, you will:



Successfully launch multiple new products or product line extensions

Help expand the business into at least one new international market or sales channel

Improve communication, execution, and accountability across teams

Build a clear reporting system and dashboard for leadership

Deliver actionable recommendations that improve growth, profitability, and operational efficiency

Become the key cross-functional leader helping the company scale



Within the first 6–12 months, you will:



Identify and implement multiple cost-saving initiatives that materially improve margins

Improve supplier terms and reduce freight and operational costs

Help launch new products or channels that drive incremental revenue

Build a clear dashboard and KPI system for leadership

Improve Amazon profitability through better pricing, inventory, and performance management

Lead at least one major growth initiative, such as a retail partnership or international expansion project

Qualifications

3–7+ years of experience in strategy, operations, consulting, finance, e-commerce, supply chain, or a similar role

Strong analytical and financial modeling skills

Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills

Experience building business cases, forecasting, and profitability models

Comfortable working with large datasets and turning them into clear insights

Strong project management and execution skills

Excellent communication and presentation skills

Ability to work cross-functionally and influence teams without direct authority

Highly detail-oriented, organized, and self-directed

Entrepreneurial mindset with a bias toward action

Strong Plus If You Have

Experience with Amazon, consumer products, or e-commerce businesses

Experience negotiating with suppliers, manufacturers, or logistics partners

Experience in retail expansion, wholesale, or international markets

Experience with freight, supply chain, or sourcing

Experience at a startup, high-growth company, consulting firm, or private equity-backed business

Familiarity with tools such as:

Amazon Seller Central

Helium 10

Google Analytics

Power BI / Looker Studio / Tableau

SQL or basic data analysis tools

Compensation

Competitive salary + performance bonus

Significant opportunity for growth and ownership

Work directly with leadership on high-impact projects

Flexible / entrepreneurial environment with the ability to shape the future of the business

Sample Projects You May Work On

Negotiate with suppliers to reduce COGS by 10–20%

Identify a lower-cost freight forwarder and improve cash flow through better payment terms

Build a profitability model for launching a new SKU

Evaluate whether to expand into retail, distributors, or international markets

Analyze Amazon pricing and TACOS to improve contribution margin

Build an executive dashboard tracking sales, profit, inventory, and growth initiatives

Lead the launch plan for a new product line from sourcing through go-to-market

WhatsApp: +1 (
)

title: Senior Medusa.js Developer
description:
About USs

We are building a next-generation, premium marketplace. We are moving beyond the traditional "Buy It Now" model to create a dynamic trading platform that includes a sophisticated "Make an Offer" negotiation engine, a digital wallet system, and a full-service physical consignment and warehousing operation.



This is not a standard e-commerce build. We are creating a complex, multi-sided marketplace with unique business logic, hybrid payment flows, and physical inventory management. We have chosen Medusa.js as our foundational architecture because we need total headless flexibility, robust custom workflows, and native marketplace capabilities.



The Role



We are seeking a Senior Medusa.js Developer to lead the technical architecture and development of the platform. You will be responsible for building the core custom modules that differentiate our business, integrating with third-party services, and ensuring the platform is scalable, secure, and performant.



You will work closely with the founding team to translate complex business requirements into elegant, maintainable Node.js/TypeScript code.



Key Responsibilities & Custom Modules to Build



1. The Offer Engine (State Machine): Build a robust negotiation system allowing buyers to submit offers, sellers to accept/decline/counter, and manage the complex state transitions and time-expirations of these offers using Medusa's Workflows SDK.



2. Digital Wallet & Hybrid Payments: Implement a user wallet system where users can hold funds from sales. Crucially, you must build a custom checkout flow that allows a single transaction to be split between wallet funds and a credit card (via Stripe Connect).



3. Warehousing & Consignment Module: Develop a custom backend module to manage physical inventory. This includes generating unique barcode IDs for incoming stock, tracking storage locations, and managing the "Hold in" logic (where buyers purchase but delay shipping to consolidate orders).



4. Stripe Connect Integration: Architect the complex payment splitting and automated payouts required for a multi-vendor marketplace, ensuring compliance and seamless onboarding for our consignors.



5. Multi-Channel Sync: Build robust integrations to sync our "Buy It Now" inventory with Google Shopping and eBay, ensuring real-time stock updates across all channels.



Required Skills & Experience



• Deep Medusa.js Expertise: Proven experience building complex, custom e-commerce solutions using Medusa.js (v1 or v2). You must understand its core architecture, plugin system, and Workflows SDK.



• Node.js & TypeScript: Expert-level proficiency in backend JavaScript/TypeScript development.



• Marketplace Architecture: Experience building multi-vendor marketplaces, handling split payments, and managing complex user roles.



• Stripe Connect: Deep understanding of Stripe Connect (Custom or Express accounts) for marketplace routing and payouts.



• API Design: Strong experience designing and consuming RESTful and GraphQL APIs.



• Database Management: Proficiency with PostgreSQL and Redis.



Work Setup



• Flexible hours / outcome-focused delivery: We care about what you build, not when you log on.



• Experienced Team: Work with a team running multiple SaaS brands and an established digital agency.



To Apply



Please submit:



1. Your CV or LinkedIn/GitHub profile.



2. Links to any relevant projects, demos, or code (specifically Medusa.js projects if possible).



3. Your answers to the following application questions.



Application Questions (Required)



If the above sounds like you, please apply. Your application will include the following questions:



1. What interests you most about building a complex, multi-sided marketplace?



2. Describe a previous project where you built a custom e-commerce solution or marketplace using Medusa.js. What was the most complex custom module you had to build, and how did you approach it?



3. We require a hybrid payment system where a user can pay for a $1,000 order using $400 from their digital wallet and $600 via credit card. How would you architect this custom checkout flow within Medusa.js and Stripe?



4. We need a robust "Make an Offer" engine with states like Pending, Accepted, Countered, and Expired. How would you leverage Medusa's Workflows SDK or custom services to build this state machine reliably?



5. If you had to deliver an MVP of this platform in 8–10 weeks, what would you prioritise, what would you defer, and what specific Medusa plugins or starters would you leverage to accelerate development?



6. What is your general availability each week?



7. What excites you most about joining a startup team building something new from the ground up?



8. What is your expected salary expectation?



9. Please also let us know why you are the right person, explain your experience, and tell us why we should hire you.

title: Content Operations Manager — Personal Brand + Community
description:
CONTENT OPERATIONS MANAGER — PERSONAL BRAND + COMMUNITY

Full-time | Remote | Philippines | $1,500–$2,000 USD/month | PST hours + weekends



ABOUT THIS ROLE



This is a full-time, exclusive role supporting a globally recognized finance educator and content creator with 450K+ LinkedIn followers, a 40K+ newsletter, and a growing online Academy and executive community. You will be the operational backbone of how content gets created, published, and distributed — and how a high-value community of CEOs and executives experiences our platform every day.



This is not a 9-to-5 role and it is not for someone who needs to be managed. It is for someone who runs toward problems, operates with urgency, and uses AI not as a novelty but as the foundation of how they work. If you got comfortable in your last role, this is the wrong opportunity. If you are always looking for a faster, smarter way to do what you did yesterday, keep reading.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Manage our Circle community end-to-end — onboarding, events, engagement loops, member experience, and day-to-day moderation across multiple spaces and tiers

- Coordinate content across LinkedIn, our newsletter (Beehiiv), the Academy (Thinkific), and our Financiario brand — scheduling, repurposing, and publishing with zero errors

- Maintain and execute a content calendar across both personal brand (Oana Labes) and company brand (Financiario)

- Troubleshoot and deploy HTML — fix broken elements, update landing pages, push changes to live environments without waiting for a developer

- Build and improve AI-assisted workflows to increase output volume and reduce turnaround time — and proactively replace anything you built last month with something better this month

- Manage event logistics inside Circle — live sessions, replays, announcements, and follow-up sequences

- Flag issues before they escalate. Surface problems your employer doesn't know about yet. Be two steps ahead, always.



WHAT WE REQUIRE — NO EXCEPTIONS



- Demonstrated experience managing content for a personal brand with a significant following — LinkedIn, YouTube, newsletter, or similar. We will verify this. Vague claims will disqualify you.

- Proven experience managing an online community platform (Circle, Mighty Networks, Slack, 
) at an operational level — not just participation

- Ability to troubleshoot and fix HTML/CSS issues and deploy to live environments. This will be tested.

- Fluent, professional English — written and spoken. This role involves executive-facing communication.

- AI-native work style — you can demonstrate specific workflows you have built and measurably improved over time. "I use ChatGPT" is not sufficient.

- Notion proficiency — you use it to stay organized and can show how

- Available full-time, exclusively — no other clients, no side projects that compete for your attention during work hours

- Available during PST business hours and on weekends as needed. This is a high-output role.

- Minimum 2 years in a single role with a verifiable reference who will answer the phone



WHO YOU ARE



- You move fast and think clearly at the same time — speed without sloppiness

- You are organized by default, not by effort — your systems are tighter than your employer expects

- You take initiative and solve problems before reporting them — not the other way around

- You are loyal. You do not treat this as a stepping stone. You build something and you own it.

- You understand personal branding mechanics at a deep level — what makes content perform, why audiences grow, how community trust is built

- You are comfortable working in a monitored environment with tracked hours and clear output expectations — and you prefer it that way because you have nothing to hide

- You do not need to be the most creative person in the room. You need to be the most reliable and the fastest executor in the room.



COMPENSATION



$1,500–$2,000 USD per month depending on experience and demonstrated results. After a successful 90-day trial, a performance bonus structure applies based on output targets. This is a contractor arrangement. You are responsible for your own taxes and benefits. We pay on time, every time.



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application with the following:



1. A Loom video (90 seconds max) where you address each of these directly:

   - A personal brand or creator account you've managed and what you did there

   - A community platform you've operated (Circle, Mighty Networks, Slack, or similar)

   - An HTML or CSS fix you've deployed to a live environment

   - An AI workflow you've built that you actually use

   - How you use Notion to stay organized



2. Links to your LinkedIn profile, one community or account you've managed, and one piece of content you wrote yourself



3. One professional reference — a former employer or client — with a name and contact info

title: Senior Elementor + SEO Implementation Specialist – High-Volume Build (100 Pages)
description:
**Website UX/UI + SEO Implementation Specialist (WordPress / Elementor)**



We are a New York–based mental health group practice seeking a **highly technical Website UX/UI + SEO Implementation Specialist** to rebuild and scale our website.



This role is **execution-focused**.

Not content writing. Not strategy consulting.



You will be responsible for building, structuring, and optimizing pages with precision, consistency, and speed.



---



## **Project Scope & Pace**



This is a **high-volume build**:



* Approximately **80–100 pages** will be created

* **All content will be provided** (no writing required)

* Pages must follow a **consistent design system and template structure**



We are looking for someone who can:



* Work **quickly without sacrificing quality**

* Maintain **visual and structural consistency across all pages**

* Execute in **batches (10–20 pages at a time)**

* Deliver reliably without constant supervision



---



## **Required Skills (All 3 Are Mandatory)**



### **1. WordPress + Elementor (Advanced)**



* Build and structure pages using Elementor templates

* Maintain clean layout, spacing, and alignment

* Ensure full mobile responsiveness

* Proper use of H1 / H2 / H3 hierarchy



### **2. JSON-LD Schema Implementation**



* Implement structured data correctly

* Validate using Google Rich Results Test

* Ensure schema matches page intent



### **3. On-Page SEO Execution**



* Meta titles & descriptions

* Internal linking structure

* URL slugs

* RankMath or Yoast optimization



---



## **Responsibilities**



* Build 80–100 service pages using Elementor templates

* Implement and validate schema on all pages

* Format pages cleanly (desktop + mobile)

* Add metadata and internal links

* Fix layout issues (spacing, alignment, responsiveness)

* Implement redirects where needed

* Perform full QA before submission



---



## **Design & Execution Expectations**



* Strong **UX/UI judgment** (spacing, hierarchy, readability)

* Ability to **translate content into clean, conversion-focused layouts**

* Experience building **scalable page templates** (not designing each page from scratch)

* Maintain consistency across desktop and mobile

* Attention to detail at a **pixel level**



---



## **Additional Requirements**



* Experience working with **Claude (AI-assisted workflows)**

* Ability to work with **Figma designs and translate into live pages**

* Understanding of **site speed optimization (Core Web Vitals)**

* Organized, structured, and reliable



---



## **Portfolio Requirements (Mandatory)**



You must provide:

* Examples showing both **design quality and performance**

* Live links only (no screenshots)



---



## **Timeline Expectations**



* This is a **fast-moving project**

* You must be able to handle **high output per week**

* Consistent delivery is required



---



## **How to Apply**



Submit your application via JotForm:





Only applicants who complete the form will be considered.



---



## **Important**



This is not a creative exploration role.



We are looking for someone who executes cleanly, precisely, and consistently at scale.



If your work is not structured, detail-oriented, and technically strong, this will not be a fit.
