title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
About Pirate Ventures: 



 At Pirate Ventures, we create and manage immersive hospitality and entertainment experiences that “Deliver the Unexpected.” From themed pop-up bars to unique venue activations, we’re driven by creativity, operational excellence, and community. We're looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized Virtual Executive Assistant to support our Culinary and Operations Directors and help streamline their day-to-day administrative operations. 



 Position Overview: 



 The Virtual Executive Assistant plays a central role in ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of executive-level workflows. This is a fully remote position that supports two senior leaders — the Culinary Director and the Operations Director — with scheduling, HR coordination, vendor communications, and operational tasks. The ideal candidate is proactive, tech-savvy, and thrives in a fast-paced environment. 



 Availability:  



Full-time (40 hours/week), aligned to Eastern Standard Time. 



Key Responsibilities: 



 HR & People Operations Support: 



Hiring & Applicant Tracking: Manage job postings across applicant tracking platforms, coordinate interviews, and support hiring managers with scheduling. 



Background Check Coordination: Manage the background check process for new hires, ensuring timely completion and documentation. 



Employee Verification & Documentation: Respond to employment verification requests and other HR-related information inquiries. 



Benefits Administration: Validate and upload 401(k) contribution files; assist with benefits-related data entry and reporting. 



Payroll Support: Input wage garnishment deductions into the payroll system with accuracy and confidentiality. 



System Access Management: Maintain user access for internal systems and tools related to HR, payroll, and business operations. 



 



 Business Administration & Operational Support: 



 Mailbox Management: Monitor the virtual mailbox daily; flag items for scanning, shredding, or physical pickup as needed 



Calendar & Meeting Coordination: Manage company-wide calendars and coordinate recurring and ad hoc meetings across departments. 



Licensing & Compliance: Oversee business license and ABCA licensing processes; maintain a calendar of deadlines and ensure timely renewals and submissions. 



Parking & Transit Administration: Look up and pay company-related parking tickets; manage transportation stipends and reimbursements. 



Supplies & Vendor Orders: Coordinate print and office supply orders and liaise with vendors to fulfill company needs. 



Gifting Coordination: Source, package, and send gifts for tea
mbers, clients, and special occasions. 



Document & Data Management: Draft and format internal documents, maintain organized digital filing systems, and support ongoing process improvement. 



Qualifications: 



 Proven experience in office or administrative management (virtual/remote strongly preferred) 



Strong proficiency in cloud-based tools (e.g., Google Workspace, Slack, Zoom, Asana, payroll/HRIS systems) 



Excellent written and verbal communication skills 



Highly organized with strong attention to detail and follow-through 



Ability to handle confidential information with discretion 



Prior experience in hospitality, HR, or operations is a plus 



Compensation: 



 Commensurate with experience. This is a full-time, remote position (40 hours/week) with working hours on Eastern Standard Time. 



To Apply: 



 Submit your resume and a short 1–2-minute video introducing yourself and sharing why you’re excited to join the Pirate Ventures team. We’re not looking for a polished production—just a chance to get to know you beyond the page. Please send your materials to

title: Multimedia Artist
description:
Location: Remote | Flexible Hours | Must be available for ET meeting times



Pirate Ventures is seeking a Multimedia Artist to join our fast-paced marketing team, producing on-brand visual content for multiple hospitality and entertainment brands.



This role is ideal for a designer who thrives in a dynamic environment, can follow creative direction, and is eager to grow and help the brands achieve goals.



Key Responsibilities:



Work closely under the Marketing Coordinator to execute marketing campaigns and brand initiatives across multiple venues.



Design digital and print assets: social media graphics, event posters, ads,
 graphics, and presentation decks.



Edit short-form and long-form videos for social media, ads, and events.



Assist with website updates and light development tasks on Squarespace.



Maintain brand consistency across all platforms and campaigns.



Adapt creative assets for different channels and formats (social,
, web, print, digital signage, etc.).



Collaborate with marketing and operations teams to ensure timely delivery of materials.



Stay updated on design and marketing trends to keep our visuals fresh and competitive.





Job Qualifications:



At least 2 years of experience as a graphic designer, preferably in marketing or agency environments.



Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and Canva.



Basic video editing skills in Adobe Premiere Pro and/or Canva.



Familiarity with Squarespace website development and content management.



Understanding of marketing principles and how design supports conversion and engagement.



Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple deadlines.



Flexible working hours and availability to attend ET-based meetings.





Preferred Skills:



Experience in hospitality, lifestyle, or entertainment brands.



Knowledge of
 design and marketing platforms (Mailchimp, Klaviyo).



Strong layout skills.



Ability to translate creative briefs into polished, on-brand designs.





How to Apply:



To apply, interested candidates must submit:

- Updated resume

- Portfolio showcasing relevant design work

- 1–2-minute short video introducing yourself and sharing "what excites you about the role"



Please make sure all portfolio and video links are viewable without login—otherwise, your application may not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor
description:
Dealroo
dia is hiring a Video Editor



We’re looking for a Video Editor to help us produce high-performing content across **full-length podcasts, vlogs, and short-form clips** (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts).



Your job is to turn raw footage into content people actually watch, share, and come back to.



Here’s the deal:



We’re not a typical content agency.



At Dealroo
dia, we build organic content engines that drive demand. We help founders, startups, and VCs own their narrative, get noticed, and become the loudest voice in the room.



We’ve worked with companies backed by Sequoia, Jason Calacanis, Marc Benioff, Kevin Durant, and more.



Now we’re looking for a sharp, fast, and taste-driven Video Editor to join us.



What you’ll do:



1. Edit full-length podcast episodes (YouTube + long-form)

2. Cut high-retention short-form clips for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts

3. Edit vlogs / day-in-the-life content with strong pacing and storytelling

4. Identify and pull viral 
nts from long-form content

5. Add subtitles, motion graphics, sound effects, and music to enhance engagement

6. Optimize edits for watch time, retention, and shareability

7. Work closely with our team to execute a consistent content style



What we’re looking for:



1. Strong instincts for what makes content engaging or “viral” (very data driven and analytical)

2. Experience editing podcasts, talking-head content, or vlogs

3. Proficiency in tools like Premiere Pro, Final Cut, After Effects, or CapCut

4. Ability to edit quickly without sacrificing quality

5. Good sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual rhythm

6. Self-directed, responsive, and easy to work with



What’s in it for you:



1. Work directly on content with top-tier founders, operators, and investors

2. Build a portfolio of high-performing, widely distributed content

3. Learn how content actually drives demand for real businesses

4. Be part of a fast-growing media company with real upside



Think you’re a fit? Send over your portfolio.



If you read this all the way, include one clip you’ve edited that you think should’ve gone viral (or did) - and why.

title: Catalog Manager (eCommerce)
description:
About Us: We are a small business primarily engaged in selling products via ecommerce. We are seeking to hire a graphic designer for ongoing work. We are willing to accept a part time or full time applicant for long term, stable, employment.



You will work with a small team to develop designs for products (apparel, giftware and drinkware), packaging, package inserts, and product listing graphics.



Job Tasks



Following the brand rules, carefully create marketable graphic and text designs for various products like mugs, cups, t-shirts, backpacks, scarves and gifts. Ensure each design matches the brand style and looks great to the people who might want to buy it.



Creating vibrant, full-color designs that cover the entire surface of clothing and gifts while staying true to the brand's style guidelines. Stay updated on current style and fashion trends to ensure designs are fresh and appealing to the target audience.



Creating graphic design templates to transform designs into different color palettes and patterns. Additionally, refining product mockup templates to accurately represent the final product's appearance, ensuring consistency and quality across all designs.



Conducting research on product and market concepts to understand emerging trends and consumer preferences. This involves analyzing market data, studying competitors, and staying updated on industry developments to inform the creation of innovative designs and products that connect with target audiences.



Juggling various tasks and projects at once, making sure to finish them on time. This involves organizing tasks, working with others, and using resources well to get things done when they're needed.



Guiding and overseeing two graphic designers, checking their work, and giving them advice on how to improve it. If needed, suggesting changes to make sure the artwork meets our standards.



Requirements:



Adobe Photoshop



Adobe Illustrator



Logo Design



Graphic design for apparel and gift products



Use of AI image generators (such as Midjourney or Ideogram) to develop design concepts or create design elements.



Experience working with a Print on Demand (POD), apparel or gift products company, this must be highlighted in your CV, portfolio or application.



Bonus Skills:



Wordpress



PSD to HTML



Video Editing and Motion Graphics



T-Shirt Design



Seamless background/pattern design



Your Application Must:



Highlight your experience creating designs for a POD, apparel or gift company.



Highlight any experience with any project management, or production management software.



If you link to a Google Drive, and we have to request access to view your files, we will immediately disregard your application.



You can work from home, with a flexible schedule Please apply using the form below:

title: Website Copywriters — WordPress/Elementor Experience Required
description:
We're an Australian web design agency looking for a fast, reliable copywriter to join our team on an ongoing basis.



You'll be writing copy for client websites built on WordPress/Elementor. Each job is straightforward - service business websites for trades and local businesses. Copy needs to be clear, conversion focused and written in a natural Australian tone. 



What you'll be doing:



* Writing copy for service business websites - homepages, about pages, service pages and contact pages

* Working fast - each job should take no more than 2-4 hours

* Using Claude AI as assistance to speed up your workflow

* Delivering clean, ready to publish copy that fits directly into Elementor layouts



What we're looking for:



* Strong copywriting skills with a natural, conversational tone

* High level of English communication 

* Experience writing for WordPress/Elementor websites — you understand how copy fits into page layouts

* Fast turnaround — 2-4 hours per website, no exceptions

* Comfortable using AI tools to assist your workflow

* Reliable, communicative and able to work independently

* Immediate start required



This is ongoing work - we're scaling quickly and the right person will have consistent jobs coming through regularly.



To apply please start your message with "I listen Dylan" and include examples of website copy you have written.

title: AI Video Production Assistant
description:
We're Hiring:!

AI Video Production Assistant

Full time role!



Hey there! We run a fast-growing network of Youtube channels, publishing daily content across niches. We need a reliable, detail-oriented person to help us keep up with production.



This is a production role, not a creative one. You'll follow a defined workflow to take video concepts from start to finish — including scripting, video creation, and publishing — using a suite of AI tools we'll train you on. Expect to manage a high daily output across multiple channels.



What We're Looking For

• Available full-time (8 hrs/day, flexible scheduling)

• Strong attention to detail — accuracy in publishing matters

• Self-motivated and able to work independently

• Comfortable learning new browser-based AI tools quickly

• Reliable internet and responsive during working hours

• Good written English; you don't need to speak all languages we publish in

• Committed long-term — this is a core team role!



Would be Nice to Have

• YouTube or content publishing experience

• Prior use of AI tools (writing, image, or video generation)

• Virtual assistant or operations background



Salary:

Base: $300 USD/month + potential bonuses!

Performance review after months with potential increase

All tools you need will be paid for you, you don't have to pay anything yourself.



To Apply, Send a short message starting with the word BLUEPRINT (to confirm you've read this). Include: a brief intro and where you're based, your availability and timezone, any relevant experience, and why you'd thrive in a fast-paced, process-driven role.



Please only apply if this would be your primary focus — not a side gig.

title: WordPress Migration & Domain Transfer Specialist — Ongoing Role
description:
We're an Australian web design agency looking for a proven WordPress migration and domain transfer specialist for an ongoing role.



This is not a role for someone still learning. We need someone who has done this hundreds of times and can work completely independently without any hand holding. You'll be handling site migrations, domain transfers and hosting setups on a regular basis and we need it done quickly, cleanly and without issues every single time.



What you'll be doing:



* WordPress site migrations between hosting environments

* Domain transfers and DNS configuration

* Hosting setup and management

* Communicating directly with clients to obtain any verification codes, access credentials or requirements needed to complete the migration — we will not be the middleman here, you handle this directly

* Confirming all contact forms are correctly linked and functioning after every migration

* Troubleshooting any issues that arise during migration independently



What we're looking for:



* Proven experience with WordPress migrations and domain transfers — non negotiable

* Ability to work completely independently — no hand holding, no step by step guidance

* Strong communication skills — you will be speaking directly with clients regularly to obtain what you need

* Fast execution — migrations need to be completed quickly and cleanly every time

* Reliable and available on short notice for ongoing work

* 100% proven track record — be prepared to demonstrate your experience



This is ongoing work — we have a growing client base and regular migrations coming through. The right person will have consistent work long term.



To apply please start your message with "I listen Dylan" and include specific examples of WordPress migrations and domain transfers you have completed.

title: Customer Service and Dispatching Jr. Coordinator
description:
*** To apply, please submit your resume and a 2-3 minute video highlighting your experience***



Hours: Monday - Friday 6:00 am - 2:30pm EST



Company Overview:



Alvita Care is a preferred provider of private home care services. We supply premier in-home care

services designed to enhance the well-being, independence & dignity of our clients across multiple

markets. We provide relief and assurance to family members who know that their loved ones are

happy, safe and cared for. We don’t believe in one-size fits all solutions and tailor our care plans to

each individual client’s needs.



It is our mission to ensure our clients are happy, safe, well cared for, and above all treated with

dignity and respect. Alvita is unique in its focus on the entire family unit, not just the senior with

whose care we are entrusted. In addition, we differentiate ourselves from competitors through 24/7

availability (never through an answering service), guaranteed compatibility between client and

caregiver, and RN oversite on every case.



What You Will Do

timely manner, while ensuring outstanding customer satisfaction.

• Communicate openly with other tea
mbers in the department regarding scheduling,

attendance, Client changes in condition, and escalating larger-scale issues as determined

for prompt resolution and follow up.

• Verify caregivers’ attendance daily ensuring they are attending their scheduled cases and

be able to prioritize staffing cases for no-shows, call-outs, or any missed visits based on the

Client’s needs of care

• Handle and respond promptly to all incoming Client and caregiver calls and

• Communicate with Clients and their families regarding appointment scheduling, plan of

care updates, any and all changes in schedule

• Maintain and document communication with all Clients in the specified home health

software

• Coordinate the caregivers’ schedules and maintain a schedule of all services rendered per

month

• Verify billed services against requested services, working in tandem with the Finance

Department

• Maintain Client confidentiality and privacy with dignity and respect

• Ensure compliance with DOH regulations and internal policies and procedures

• Ad hoc projects as needed



Who You Are:

• Ability to manage a caseload in a fast-paced environment

• Ability to multitask

• History of achieving the high customer service satisfaction rates

• Excellent communication abilities (written and oral)

title: Collection Specialist - Property Management
description:
About Us

Coastal Group Inc. is a Virginia Beach–based property management company with 40+ years of

experience managing residential and commercial properties. We’re adding a Collections

Specialist to reduce delinquency timelines while maintaining the professional, relationship-

driven tone our owners and tenants expect.



The Role



You’ll be the voice of Coastal Group when a tenant has fallen behind on rent. Your job is to

make contact, build rapport, show empathy, and guide the conversation toward a payment

commitment. You’ll work from scripts, but your emotional intelligence is what determines

success.



• Place outbound calls and follow-ups to tenants with delinquent balances

• Navigate difficult conversations with empathy, professionalism, and persistence

• Document all interactions and outcomes in our property management system

• Coordinate with the management team on escalations and payment plans

• Track your collection metrics and contribute to weekly reporting



What We’re Looking For

Industry doesn’t matter. How you communicate does.



Must-haves:

• Exceptional spoken English with a clear, neutral accent — tenants must feel like they’re

speaking with a U.S.-based professional

• High emotional intelligence — you can read tone, de-escalate frustration, and hold firm

without being aggressive

• Experience in collections, accounts receivable, customer retention, or any persuasion-

based role

• Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for calls

• Available during U.S. Eastern Time business hours



Nice-to-haves:

• Property management or real estate experience

• Familiarity with Buildium, Yardi, or similar PMS

• Track record of meeting collection targets



How to Apply — All 3 Steps Required

1. Submit your application with your updated resume/CV on OnlineJobs.ph.

2. Record a Loom video (3–5 minutes). This is required — applications without a Loom will

not be reviewed. Include the link in your application.



Your Loom must cover:

• Introduce yourself — name, location, brief professional background

• Collections story — walk through a specific time you successfully collected on a

delinquent account or persuaded someone to take a financial action they were resisting

• Live scenario — a tenant says “I already told the office I’d pay next week — stop calling

me.” Talk through how you’d respond

• Why this role — what makes you a strong fit for collections at a U.S. property

management company

• Availability & setup — confirm your hours (ET), internet speed, and workspace



What we’re evaluating:

English fluency & accent clarity • Communication confidence • Emotional intelligence • Ability to think

on your feet • Overall presence — would a tenant trust and respond to you?

3. Answer these screening questions in your application message:

1. Years of experience in collections or a similar persuasion-based role?

2. Spoken English proficiency (1–10)? We’ll verify in the Loom.

3. Available hours in U.S. Eastern Time?

4. Internet speed (download/upload)?

5. Property management software experience? Which ones?

6. Expected hourly rate (USD)?



Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.



We review on a rolling basis and will reach out to qualified candidates for a live interview.

Decathlon

Proficient in Excel / Google Sheets

Familiar with Canva or basic image editing tools

Strong work ethic and proactive mindset

Eager to learn and improve continuously



What We Offer



Remote, long-term position

Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing e-commerce company

A dynamic role with a lot of responsibility and ownership

Career growth opportunities for high performers



If you are a motivated e-commerce professional who enjoys structure, optimization, and taking ownership, we would love to hear from you.

title: Civil Engineering Virtual Assistant — Stormwater / Site Design (U.S. Engineering Firm)
description:
Hours: 36 hrs/week, flexible overlap with U.S. Eastern Time

Salary: $200/week ($800/month), with annual performance reviews and raises

Start date: ASAP



ABOUT US

Alchemy Excavation is an Indiana-based civil engineering and excavation company owned by a licensed Professional Engineer (PE) with 25+ years of experience. We do stormwater design, site development, drainage, floodplain work, and excavation/site work for counties, cities, towns, and private clients along the I-69 corridor in Indiana. We're growing and building a long-term remote team — we already have one Filipino tea
mber handling marketing/SEO who has been with us and doing excellent work.



A NOTE ABOUT HOW I WORK

I'm an ENTP (Myers-Briggs) — I'm a big-picture thinker, fast-moving, full of ideas, and I juggle a lot. I need a teammate who can be my counterbalance: someone calm, steady, detail-oriented, and who can take an idea and run with it independently without needing me to hold their hand. I'll give you direction and be available when you're stuck, but I'm not going to micromanage. If you're the kind of person who learns by digging in, figuring things out, asking good questions when you're truly stuck, and enjoys working with a high-energy creative type — we're going to get along great.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Has a degree in Civil Engineering (or is close to completing one)

- Fluent in written and spoken English

- Learns independently — can research, experiment, and figure things out with light guidance

- Calm, steady, and detail-oriented (bonus points if you balance out scattered energy)

- Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to work faster and smarter — this is required

- Organized and communicates proactively — you tell me what's happening before I have to ask

- Wants to learn U.S. stormwater and site design standards

- Coachable, honest about what you don't know, and hungry to grow

- Flexible and easygoing — we're a small team, things move fast, plans change



BONUS POINTS (not required, but move you to the top):

- Midwest U.S. or Indiana project experience

- Familiarity with INDOT standards or Indiana stormwater regulations

- Experience working with 3D surfaces in Civil 3D (surface creation, grading, volume calculations)

- Experience building AI automations or workflows (custom GPTs, 
, Python scripts, automated drafting tools, etc.)

- Prior experience working with a U.S.-based engineering firm



RESPONSIBILITIES

- AutoCAD / Civil 3D drafting — site plans, grading, drainage, utility layouts

- 3D surface modeling, grading design, and earthwork volume calculations

- Stormwater calculations and modeling (HydroCAD, StormCAD, or similar — we'll train)

- Hydrology and hydraulic calculations (rational method, SCS method, culvert sizing)

- Preparing drainage reports and permit application documents

- Converting field sketches, notes, and measurements into clean drawings (field photos will be provided by our U.S. team — no on-site work required)

- Helping prepare excavation job estimates and quantity takeoffs

- Organizing project files in Google Drive

- Attending a weekly 30-minute Google Meet call and responding to
 during your shift



BONUS SKILLS (Nice to Have, Not Required)

- Experience with Indiana or U.S. stormwater regulations

- ArcGIS or QGIS experience

- Floodplain modeling (HEC-RAS)

- Familiarity with MS4 permitting



WHAT YOU GET

- $200/week with annual performance reviews and raises

- Long-term stable position (we're building a team, not short-term gigs)

- Weekly pay, paid on time via PayPal or Wise

- 13th-month pay (Christmas bonus equal to one month's salary)

- Paid Philippine regular holidays

- Flexible schedule — as long as you hit your hours and overlap with U.S. hours when needed

- Mentorship from a licensed U.S. Professional Engineer

- Exposure to a wide range of real projects

- Room to grow — this role can expand as you prove yourself



HOW TO APPLY

Please reply with:

1. Your resume

2. A short note (3–5 sentences) telling me what excites you about civil engineering and why this role fits you

3. A portfolio, sample drawings, or a link to school/past project work — student work is fine

4. Which AI tools you've used and a specific example of how you used one to solve a problem

5. Your expected monthly salary

6. Bonus: What's your Myers-Briggs type, or how would you describe your working style?



SCREENING QUESTIONS (please answer both):

1. When sizing a culvert, what are the two or three main factors you consider?

2. What's the typical minimum slope for a surface drainage swale?



I'll personally review every application. Serious applicants only — please don't apply if you can't commit to long-term work.

title: Early-Stage Startup Team (Marketing / Growth / Web / SaaS) – Build Something From Day 0
description:
I’m building a SaaS product and putting together a small, focused team to help bring it to life before full launch.



This is not a typical job. It’s early-stage, fast-moving, and collaborative. You’ll be working directly with me and a small group inside 
, testing ideas, building systems, and helping grow something from scratch.



Right now, I’m looking for people who can contribute in at least one of these areas:



SaaS marketing (organic + paid)

Marketing creation (ads, funnels, landing pages, targeting, etc.)

Website development + optimization (I already have a site — it just needs to be rebuilt and improved)

HubSpot / CRM setup and integration

title: Creative VA – AI Content & Marketing (Vanta Systems + Events Brand)
description:
We're a fast-moving marketing and events company looking for a sharp, self-directed Virtual Assistant who figures things out without hand-holding. You'll primarily support Vanta Systems (a B2B marketing agency serving pool builders and outdoor living contractors in Florida) and occasionally our events brand.

This role is for someone who is resourceful, takes initiative, and uses AI tools to work smarter. If you need step-by-step instructions for every task, this isn't the right fit.



What You'll Be Doing



Vanta Systems (Primary)



Create ad graphics using AI image generation tools (Midjourney, Ideogram, or similar) and finish them in Canva — think AI-rendered pool and outdoor living visuals with text overlays, similar to Meta ad creatives

Replicate and recreate ad creatives from reference examples provided

Post and manage content in Meta Business Suite

Follow SOPs to build out basic websites and Google My Business profiles

General VA tasks — research, organizing assets, formatting content, managing files

GoHighLevel (GHL) experience is a big plus but not required



Events Brand (Secondary)



Clip event footage into short-form content when needed

Organize raw footage and media assets in Google Drive



What We're Looking For



Strong with AI tools — image generation, ChatGPT, Claude, or similar

Proficient in Canva

Comfortable with Meta Business Suite

Resourceful — can take a reference and figure out how to replicate it

Fluent in English (written and spoken)

Detail-oriented and consistent

Familiar with Claude Cowork or AI-assisted workflows is a major plus



Requirements



Must be comfortable working with Hubstaff time tracking — minimum 70% activity rate required. This is non-negotiable.

Available Mon, Wed, Thu or fully async

15 hrs/week to start with room to grow

Must be able to take a creative brief or reference example and execute without micromanagement



Wage: $4USD/hr with room to grow



To Apply

At the end of your application, include a 1-2 minute video introducing yourself. Tell us your name, what tools you use daily, and show us one piece of work you've created using AI. Applications without a video will not be considered — this is how we know you actually read this post.

title: Owner Relationship Specialist
description:
Position: Owner Relationship Specialist

Company: Corporate stays

Employment Type: Freelancer /Full time

Working hours: Monday to Friday, 9 am to 6 pm Montreal time

Work from home





About Us



Corporate Stays is a global leader in furnished apartments and short-term rental management, with over 1,000 units in Canada and a rapidly growing portfolio across Latin America (Panama, Paraguay, Mexico, Brazil, Chile, Costa Rica).



We operate a portfolio of 300+ units and are scaling quickly, focusing on maximizing revenue, occupancy, and operational efficiency.





Role Overview



We are looking for an Owner Relationship Specialist to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for managing and strengthening relationships with property owners, ensuring their satisfaction, and maximizing the performance of our portfolio.



This role requires strong communication, ownership, and the ability to coordinate across multiple teams.







Key Responsibilities



Build, manage, and maintain strong relationships with property owners

Serve as the primary point of contact for all owner communications

Proactively address owner concerns, questions, and escalations

Ensure high levels of owner satisfaction and retention

Monitor property performance (occupancy, revenue, guest feedback) and share insights with owners

Prepare and present regular performance reports to owners

Identify opportunities to improve property performance and profitability

Coordinate with internal teams (operations, housekeeping, maintenance, sales, finance) to resolve issues efficiently

Follow up on maintenance, operational, or service-related issues affecting owner satisfaction

Support onboarding of new properties and ensure a smooth integration process

Review and ensure compliance with owner agreements and company standards

Assist in negotiating terms, renewals, and updates to owner agreements when needed

Track and manage owner requests, ensuring timely resolution

Support billing-related questions and coordinate with finance when necessary

Identify risks in owner relationships and proactively implement solutions

Contribute to improving internal processes related to owner management

Maintain accurate records of all owner communications and updates in internal systems



Requirements



Previous experience in customer service, account management, property management, or similar roles

Strong communication skills in English (written and verbal)

Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities

Strong problem-solving and conflict-resolution skills

Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks

Experience in hospitality, real estate, or property management is a strong plus

Comfortable working in a fast-paced, remote environment.

mber in the Philippines and now we want to add 2 to 3 more full time people to help with customer service and inside sales.

title: Litigation Paralegal
description:
Part-Time Litigation Paralegal







Job Type: Part-Time (20 hours per week)



Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM Pacific Time



Salary: $550 per month











Job Overview: 



We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive Litigation Paralegal to help manage the day-to-day operations of our litigation practice. The ideal candidate will be the "right hand" to the principal attorney, ensuring that all procedural requirements are met, deadlines are tracked, and case files are meticulously maintained.











Key Responsibilities:



Calendaring & Deadline Management: Maintain the firm’s master calendar using Clio and Google Calendar. Calculate and track statutory deadlines per the California Code of Civil Procedure (CCP).

Court Filing: Prepare and electronically file (e-file) pleadings, motions, and discovery in various California Superior Courts and Federal District Courts.

Document Preparation: Draft routine legal documents, including proofs of service, notices, subpoenas, and basic motions. Assist in the preparation of trial bundles and exhibit lists.

Legal Research & Discovery: Conduct preliminary legal research using Westlaw/LexisNexis. Assist with document review, production, and the drafting of discovery requests and responses.

Case Management: Maintain organized digital files within Clio, ensuring all communications and documents are properly logged and categorized.









Required Skills & Qualifications:



Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of experience as a litigation paralegal. Specific experience in Real Estate law (partition, breach of contract, title disputes) in California is highly preferred.

Technical Proficiency: Advanced proficiency in Clio Manage/Grow and Microsoft Office Suite is mandatory. Comfort with e-filing portals (e.g., InfoTrack) preferred.

Knowledge: Strong understanding of California civil litigation procedures and court rules.









Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant — Dog Training Business (USA Hours, Phone-Capable, Long-Term)
description:
I own and operate a premium board and train dog training facility in Texas. I have been in business for over 30 years and train over 300 dogs per year. I am looking for one exceptional long-term VA to become a key part of my team.



This is not a data entry job. This is a real executive assistant role with responsibility, ownership, and room to grow. I need someone who takes initiative, communicates proactively, and treats this like their own business.



Your core responsibilities will include:

Lead management — responding to all new inquiries within 5 minutes during business hours, qualifying leads, and booking consultations. Speed matters enormously here. The first person to respond wins the client.

Go High Level CRM — managing the pipeline, tracking every dog currently in our program, and sending pickup reminders to clients at 7 days, 3 days, and the day before their dog goes home.

Calendar management — scheduling consultations, pickups, drop-offs, and follow-up calls.

Client communication — professional written and verbal communication with dog owners. 



You will be the voice of the business when I am training. I will train you personally on exactly what to say, how to respond to inquiries, and how to handle every client situation. 



We will work closely together every day to build this system and you will never be left guessing.

Basic bookkeeping support — preparing invoices and tracking payments. No direct bank access required.



Time Doctor — you will be tracked and I expect you to be comfortable with that.



You are the right person if:

You have experience as an executive assistant or operations VA for a service business.

Your spoken and written English is at a near-native or C2 level — you will be speaking with American clients on the phone.

You are available during US Central hours — 8am to 6pm Monday through Friday plus weekend availability when needed.

You are dominant by personality — you take charge, follow through, and do not wait to be told twice.

You have used Go High Level or a similar CRM before.

You are looking for a long-term position with one employer, not juggling five clients at once.

You thrive in a close collaborative working relationship with frequent direct communication throughout the day.



This is a full-time exclusive position.

You may not hold other jobs or clients while working with me. I will know if you are splitting your attention and it will end the working relationship immediately. 



We will be in direct communication by phone,
, and Slack multiple times throughout every working day. You need to be responsive, present, and fully available during US Central hours. If you are the kind of person who thrives with close collaboration and direct communication this will be a great fit. If you prefer to work independently with minimal contact this is not the right role.



You are not the right person if:

You are currently working for other clients and are not willing to give that up.

You disappear when things get busy.

You need constant supervision to complete tasks.

Your English is strong in writing but hesitant on the phone.

You treat this like a side job.



To apply you must do the following or your application will not be considered:

Record a short 60 to 90 second voice memo introducing yourself, explaining your relevant experience, and telling me why you are the right person for this role. Attach it to your application or provide a link.

Answer these three questions in writing:



What CRM or project management tools have you used and how did you use them?

Describe a time you had to manage a difficult client or situation without being supervised. What did you do?

What does long-ter
an to you when it comes to a job?



Applications without the voice memo and written answers will not be reviewed.

Hours: Full time, US Central hours

Start: Immediately for the right person

title: Pre-Litigation Case Manager
description:
Send a message if you have these qualifications - 
 

Responsibilities:



Client Communication:

Serve as the primary point of contact for clients during the pre-litigation phase

Communicate regularly with clients to provide case updates, gather information and address inquiries.



Case Evaluation:

Conduct detailed reviews of personal injury cases to assess liability, damages, and potential legal strategies.

Work closely with attorneys to develop case strategies and action plans



Document Management:

Organize and manage case documentation, including medical records, police reports, and other relevant evidence.

Ensure all required documents are obtained and properly maintained.



Insurance Communication:

Communicate with insurance companies, opposing parties, and other involved entities to negotiate settlements and resolve pre-litigation matters.

Coordinate the exchange of information between parties involved in the case.



Medical Records Coordination:

Request, review, and organize medical records and bills related to clients' injuries.

Collaborate with medical providers to obtain necessary documentation.



Client Advocacy:

Advocate on behalf of clients to ensure their rights and interests are protected during the pre-litigation process.

Work towards fair and timely resolutions for clients.



Settlement Negotiations:

Engage in settlement negotiations with insurance adjusters to achieve favorable outcomes for clients.

Present comprehensive demand packages supported by relevant documentation.



Case Progression Tracking:

Utilize case management systems to track and document case progression.

Provide regular updates to attorneys and other stakeholders on case status.



Qualifications:

Previous experience as a Case Manager or similar role in personal injury law.

Knowledge of personal injury law, case management processes, and pre-litigation procedures.

Strong negotiation and communication skills.

Detail-oriented with excellent organizational and time management abilities.

title: E-commerce Finance & Operations Analyst
description:
About Us

We are a Dutch e-commerce company, managing multiple brands across consumer electronics, home & lifestyle, and supplements. Our team is small, fast-moving, and scaling quickly. We already have a solid admin team in place - now we need someone who can take ownership of the financial and operational side and turn our data into decisions.



About the Role

We have a lot of moving parts - stock, payouts, margins, multiple brands. We need someone who can bring structure to our financial and operational data, work closely with our admin team, and make sure we always know exactly where we stand.



Your Responsibilities



- Clean and connect our various Excel/Google Sheets across stock, sales, purchasing, and expenses

- Reconcile weekly 
 payouts and track margin and ROI per product

- Monitor inventory levels across warehouses and send data-backed reorder alerts before we run out

- Build and maintain weekly and monthly P&L reports that reflect true business health

- Identify bottlenecks in our current admin flow and implement practical automated solutions

- Work closely with our existing admin team to standardize how data is collected and reported



What We're Looking For



- 3+ years of experience in e-commerce financial management, inventory control, or operations

- Expert-level Excel and/or Google Sheets skills - this will be tested during the interview, so please only apply if you're genuinely advanced

- Experience with European marketplaces like 
 or Amazon is a big plus

- Familiarity with inventory costing methods (FIFO, COGS) is a plus

- Comfortable with tools like Google Looker Studio, Notion, or any BI/reporting tool - or eager to learn

- Strong written English to collaborate with our team

- Analytical mindset - you don't just enter data, you ask what it means and what to do about it



Send us your CV and a short paragraph (5–8 sentences max) explaining: what was the messiest financial or operational situation you've ever inherited, and what did you do to fix it?

title: Child Development Content Lead – AI-Powered Educational Guides
description:
We are a growing educational content company creating posters, worksheets, and guides that help parents and teachers support children's emotional and academic development. We use AI tools to generate ideas and visuals — but human expertise, judgment, and care are at the heart of everything we publish.



About the Role

We're looking for a Child Development Content Lead who will own our guide production process from concept to final approval. You'll combine your professional background in therapy or counseling with strong editorial judgment and AI fluency to produce resources that are accurate, visually compelling, and genuinely useful for parents and teachers.

You are not a designer — we have a designer on the team. You are the expert, the editor, and the creative director who ensures every guide meets a high standard before it reaches our audience.



What You'll Do

Content Development

Generate and pitch new guide and poster ideas based on what parents and teachers need most

Use AI tools to draft guide text, then vet and refine it using your professional expertise — ensuring accuracy, age-appropriateness, and emotional sensitivity

Simplify complex child development concepts into clear, warm, parent-friendly language



Visual Direction

Use AI tools to generate a visual concept for each guide

Evaluate the output critically — flagging weak illustrations, poor layout, mismatched imagery, or anything that doesn't meet our quality bar

Brief our designer with clear, specific instructions: which illustrations to replace, what fonts to use, how to structure the layout, and what the final piece should look like



Editorial Review & Approval

Review the designer's Canva output against your brief

Assess every piece for visual quality, content accuracy, title strength, layout clarity, and age-appropriateness

Approve final pieces or provide precise feedback for revisions

Maintain a consistently high standard across all published guides



What We're Looking For

Background in therapy, counseling, or child psychology — must have

Solid understanding of child development and social-emotional learning

Ability to critically vet content for professional accuracy — you will be the expert in the room

Strong visual editorial eye — you can look at a guide and immediately identify what's working, what's too cluttered, what illustration is missing the point, or what title won't stop a parent mid-scroll

Fluent with AI tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini, or similar for both text and image generation

Clear, direct communicator — able to brief a designer with specific, actionable instructions

Meticulous and high-standards — you notice details others miss and you care about getting it right

Self-directed and comfortable working remotely and independently



Nice to Have

Experience creating educational materials for classrooms or families

Familiarity with growth mindset, SEL, or positive psychology frameworks

Experience managing or directing creative work



What We Offer

Long-term employment

$9 USD per hour as a starting pay

Fully remote, flexible working arrangement

Meaningful work that directly supports children's wellbeing

A collaborative, creative team environment



To Apply

Please send your CV and a brief note about your background and experience.

As part of the application process, you must perform a test task, follow the instructions here:


/drive/folders/1LHpVo7oQjlMOIm_aqhp7xve4WkwS5Aq-?usp=sharing



IMPORTANT: Applications without a completed test task will NOT be considered.





Your test task will be evaluated on:

Content accuracy: Does the guide faithfully and professionally represent the source text?

Illustration relevance: Are the images specific and accurate to each section — not generic?

Visual quality: Are illustrations clear, high quality, and consistent in style?

Layout: Is it clean, scannable, and uncluttered?

Typography: Does it match the style of our reference guides?

Title: Is it attention-grabbing and parent-facing?

Designer brief: Are your instructions clear and specific enough for a designer to execute without guessing?

title: Full-Time Tiktok / UGC Editor
description:
MUST COMPLETE REFERENCE VIDEOS TO BE CONSIDERED!!!



TikTok Video Editor (Full-Time)

I’m looking for a full-time TikTok video editor to produce high-volume short-form content across multiple pages.

This role is focused on fast, efficient editing — simple edits, but strong pacing and attention to detail are key.

You will be making TikTok videos using Capcup or the video editing software of your choice. The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward. Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage

Workload

• 10–20 videos per day

• Consistent daily output

Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.





Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.





B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.





You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Previous experience with CapCut, TikTok, or Instagram editing

Strong ability to collaborate within a team environment

Willingness to learn and apply constructive feedback

Availability to work 6–8 hours per day (with potential for increased compensation based on performance)



REALISTIC WORKLOAD:

For experienced editors with efficient workflows and solid equipment, the daily workload can typically be completed in 2–4 hours. However, for those still developing their skills or working with slower equipment, the same workload may take closer to 6–8 hours. High-performing editors often treat this as a flexible, part-time opportunity due to their speed and efficiency.



Ability to work 5–6 days per week



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

strong internet connection

Aspiration for growth, to learn, and future

MUST respond QUICKLY to messages

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 6-8h a day (with potential for increased salary)

Able to work 5-6 days per week

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



$
/month + bonuses with (Long-term role with growth potential)

YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED IF THIS ISN'T COMPLETED

title: Video Editor / Graphic Designer - Viral Organic + D2C Meta Ads (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Job Overview

Hypetribe Asia is hiring a Video Editor / Graphic Designer (ideally one person who does both) to join one of our portfolio brands or agencies.



We're a venture studio running viral organic content and high-converting UGC-style D2C Meta ads for US and international brands. This is not a trainee role,  we're looking for someone who's already made organic channels go viral through editing, or driven real conversion numbers on paid ads, and can walk into our team and tell us why things work.



If you've worked with US-based companies, sat through enough client feedback loops to have your own strong POV on what scrolls past vs. what stops the scroll, keep reading.



What You'll Actually Do

-Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts) for viral organic and paid ad performance

-Design static ads, thumbnails, and social graphics across our portfolio brands

-Cut UGC-style D2C Meta ads from raw creator footage (hook-forward, conversion-driven)

-Bring your own POV on hooks, pacing, captions, and visual trends — we want your taste, not just your hands

-Teach the team what you've learned from past US-client work about what converts and what goes viral

-Collaborate with our creative directors, producers, and media buyers across time zones

-Iterate fast based on performance data (you'll actually see the numbers on your work  most agencies don't show you this)

-Working knowledge of AI tools in your daily workflow — you're already using them to move faster, not resisting them. Think: generative image tools (Midjourney, Nano Banana, Higgsfield, Flux), AI video tools (Runway, Kling, Sora, Veo), AI audio (ElevenLabs, Suno), and AI-assisted editing



Nice to Have

-Motion graphics / After Effects template building

-Color grading experience (DaVinci Resolve or Premiere Lumetri)

-Experience editing for health, wellness, beauty, or D2C consumer brands

-Understanding of Meta Ads Manager basics (you don't need to buy, but you should know what the media buyer is asking for)

-Basic copywriting instinct for captions and on-screen text



Who This Is NOT For

-Entry-level editors looking for their first remote gig

-People who want step-by-step briefs with no creative input expected

-Anyone who hasn't worked with international clients before

-Editors who've never seen performance data on their own work

title: Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance
description:
GH Logistics is a growing freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. Our team is built on strong systems, clear communication, and reliable execution. As we continue to scale nationally, we are looking for a Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance to help ensure that every load is verified, compliant, and properly tracked before it moves. If you’re someone who notices the small details, enjoys organized processes, and takes pride in preventing problems before they happen this role may be a great fit.



Role Overview

Your work directly prevents missed pickups, tracking gaps, compliance issues, and communication breakdowns while collaborating closely with Operations, Sales, and Management to ensure loads move smoothly and safely with clear SOPs, structured workflows, and strong team support to help you succeed.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Review next day loads before execution

• Verify driver details (name, phone number, reachability)

• Confirm CDL validity and compliance

• Assign and confirm active tracking (FourKites and/or Samsara)

• Call drivers to confirm pickup and delivery details, appointment times, and equipment requirements

• Download and upload customer tenders when applicable

• Ensure load information is accurate in the TMS and QA trackers

• Document findings clearly and consistently

• Escalate issues when something does not meet standards

• Maintain organized records and support process improvements



What Success Looks Like

• All next day loads are reviewed before execution

• Tracking is active and confirmed

• Potential issues are caught early

• Documentation is clear and organized

• Escalations are timely and professional



Who We’re Looking For

• Have experience in US. logistics, freight, tracking, quality assurance, or operational audit

• Are comfortable auditing details and verifying information

• Understand that small details prevent big operational problems

• Follow SOPs consistently

• Communicate clearly with drivers and internal teams

• Stay organized while handling multiple tasks

• Work well independently in a structured remote environment

• Are open to feedback and continuous improvement

• Have strong written and verbal English skills

• Type at least 50 WPM



Work Setup & Schedule

• Full Time | 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM CDT/CST & 3:00 PM - 1:00 AM CDT/CST (San Antonio time)

• Must work U.S. business hours

• Collaborative Zoom based work environment (open camera & unmute mic)

• Time tracking tools used to support accountability



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Clear processes and defined expectations

• Structured systems and documented SOPs

• Supportive team collaboration

• Performance based growth opportunities

• Critical role that directly impacts operational success



If you take pride in doing things right and preventing issues before they happen, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply Here


/team/
/GHApplicationForm



Visit us:

title: AI Growth Hackers marketing & UGC Content Creators
description:
AI Growth Hackers marketing & UGC Content Creators (SaaS Launch Marketing& Community Building from scratch)

We are launching a fast-growing AI ecosystem and a new SaaS platform. We aren't looking for "just" social media managers; we are looking for Growth Hackers and Content Specialists who live and breathe Artificial Intelligence and business acquisition.

If you study Alex Hormozi’s hooks, understand the mechanics of virality, and use AI tools (beyond just ChatGPT) daily, this is for you.

We are currently filling two specific roles:

???? Role 1: AI Community Builder (Growth & Brand)

Goal: Build a new TikTok and Instagram powerhouse page from scratch ( from zero) dedicated to AI tools and tech trends. secondly : help us growth our 30K follower page dedicated on business and motivation / IA post. You should use creativity to create engaging post, using AI tools or not. 

The Mission: Turn our social pages into high-engagement channels. You will perform daily competitive monitoring (veille) by analyzing top Tech&AI influencers.

What you’ll do: Create daily short-form videos, carousels, and X 
) threads that simplify complex AI news into viral content.

Your Advantage: We provide a full dataset of top tech & AI fields influencers and specific formats to model. You execute, iterate, and grow the community.

???? Role 2: AI SaaS Conversion Specialist (UGC & Mass Distribution)  / Community manager reddit growth 

Goal: Drive sign-ups for our new AI SaaS through high-conversion UGC and "Clipping" strategies. Create high-converting UGC posting massively across multiple accounts

The Mission: Create compelling UGC-style content that communicates our SaaS value proposition.

What you’ll do: Manage multiple "clipping" accounts on TikTok and Instagram and reddit to post in mass. You will test different messaging angles, hooks, and scripts to see what actually converts into users.

Your Advantage: We provide a dedicated dataset of high-converting formats, the copywriting. Your job is to produce, distribute, and dominate the feed.

???? Absolute Requirements (Read Carefully)

Deep AI Knowledge: You are AI tools daily and passionnate by AI and technnology . If you only know ChatGPT, this isn't for you.

Business Driven: You understand customer acquisition, hooks, retention, and the psychology of "selling" through content.

Hormozi Affinity: You understand the "Value-First" content style and high-impact editing/scripting.

Language: Excellent English (written and spoken) for scriptwriting and community engagement.

Tech Savvy: Comfortable with CapCut and video making tool and social media scheduling tools.

???? What We Offer

Long-Term Growth: We start with a trial phase during pre-launch, scaling quickly to a full-time, long-term partnership.

IMPORTANT : If you excel, we will recommend your services directly to our SaaS users, opening doors to even more high-ticket opportunities.

???? How to Apply

Portfolio : Send links to social media accounts you have managed or UGC content you have created.

Role: Specify if you are applying for Role 1 (Community), Role 2 (SaaS Conversion), or if you are a unicorn who can do Both.





PLEASE READ CARREFULLY BEFORE APPLY.  We will read everything very carrefully. Finally : we are looking with someone who understand the word  " OWNERSHIP" because we will offer you more than a single job if you are the right person : long-term partner ships and clear recommendation of you to our network / the users of our saas in Europe and USA

title: Growth Hacker & UGC Content Creator for SaaS Launch
description:
We are preparing the launch of a new SaaS platform in approximately one month and are looking for exceptional Growth Hackers who can produce compelling UGC-style content and deeply understand social media distribution mechanics.

We are currently pre-qualifying candidates through interviews. Work begins during the pre-launch phase.

It is not a generic content creation job. We need someone who knows how to generate traction, validate messaging, and turn content into acquisition. 



This is more than a short project, we’re looking for someone who wants to become a long-term growth partner and help build the acquisition engine of a SaaS from the ground up. We’ll start with a few hours per week during the pre-launch phase, then scale up to full-time if the collaboration is strong and performance meets expectations.



Responsibilities

-Create UGC-style content that clearly communicates the SaaS value proposition and drives sign-ups

-Develop and run rapid growth experiments across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, Reddit, LinkedIn, and niche online communities

-Build and test different messaging angles, hooks, scripts, and content variations to identify what converts

-Analyze performance metrics and iterate quickly based on data

-Collaborate directly with the founder to shape early acquisition strategy

title: Social Media Marketer (7 Figure Online Music Education Company)
description:
(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION BELOW)



About the Role:



If you're someone who loves social media marketing, gets just as excited about strategy as you do building out content, and wants to take ownership of a key marketing channel in a growing online business, read on...



Learn Jazz Standards is a thriving 7-figure online music education business helping adult musicians finally learn to play jazz without the overwhelm. We're a small team, and that allows us to work fast. We've built a healthy content ecosystem across YouTube, blog, podcast, and
 — and now we're ready to make social media a serious, measurable growth channel.



We're looking for a Social Media Marketer who can do it all: build and execute a strategy, manage the content calendar, create and repurpose content, run ManyChat funnels, and ultimately turn Instagram and
 into real lead generation and sales engines for our business. This role sits at the intersection of execution (posting, scheduling, replying to comments) and strategic marketing (lead gen funnels, selling in the DMs, data driven decision making).



This is a full-time remote role reporting directly to the Founder. You'll be given strategic direction and goals, but we expect you to bring your own ideas, initiatives, and creative thinking to the table.



What You'll Own:



Content Strategy & Execution:



Dramatically increase our content output across Instagram and
 — both in volume and quality

Develop and manage a content calendar using tools like Meta Business Suite or Metricool

Repurpose our deep content library (YouTube videos, course clips, live Q&As, podcast transcripts, blog posts) into platform-native content: Reels, Stories, carousels, static graphics, and more

Write compelling captions, select strategic hashtags, and publish content consistently

Respond to and manage post comments, and interact with leads in the DMs



Content Creation:



Create graphics and short-form video edits when needed (basic video editing required — we have a video editor for heavier lifts, but you need to be able to move fast independently)

Work within our existing brand assets while having the skill to build new templates in Canva or similar tools when the 
nt calls for it



Lead Generation & Sales (Our Primary Objective):



Build and manage ManyChat funnels to convert social media engagement into
 subscribers and customers

Create automated DM flows that generate leads and nurture toward sales

Develop lead magnets from our existing content library to drive opt-ins

Think like a marketer first: every piece of content should serve a lead generation or sales objective



Strategy & Analytics:



Analyze platform data to understand what's working, what's not, and why

Bring data-informed recommendations to weekly strategy sessions with the Founder

Proactively identify new opportunities for growing reach, leads, and sales

Build repeatable systems and document your processes so nothing lives only in your head



What the First 90 Days Look Like:



By the end of your first 90 days, we expect you to have:



Built out a new and improved social media strategy alongside the Founder

Taken full ownership of the content calendar and posting schedule

Meaningfully increased our content output across Instagram and

Launched at least one ManyChat funnel driving measurable leads

Established a reporting rhythm with clear KPIs and progress updates

Demonstrated early, measurable progress — in leads, engagement, or both



What Makes You a Great Fit:



Must-Haves:



-3+ years of experience managing social media for a brand with a lead generation or sales focus — not just vanity metrics

Demonstrated ability to build ManyChat (or equivalent) funnels from scratch — chat automations, DM sequences, lead gen flows



-Strong content creation skills: you can write a great caption, design a clean graphic, and do basic video editing without needing hand-holding



-Comfortable with analytics — you know how to read the data and make decisions from it

Systems-oriented: you build repeatable processes, document your work, and don't let things fall through the cracks



-Self-starter who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do



-Proficient with tools like Meta Business Suite, Metricool (or similar), Canva, and AI tools for content ideation and creation



Strong Plusses:



-Experience with content repurposing workflows — turning long-form content (video, podcast, blog) into social-native formats



-Background in
 marketing or digital funnels (understanding the broader customer journey matters here)



-Genuine enthusiasm for or knowledge of music — especially jazz or music education. Our audience is adult musicians, and understanding how they think, what they struggle with, and the language they use will make everything you do more effective



Compensation & Structure:



Type: Full-time, remote



Salary: $1,500/month (1,075,905 PHP/year)



13th Month Pay: paid out in December



End of year performance bonuses: paid out in December if applicable



Reports to: Founder



Support: You'll have access to a video editor for repurposing existing content, Founder guidance, and support from other tea
mbers when needed.



TO APPLY FILL OUT THIS SHORT APPLICATION:



(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION)

title: National Customer Experience Officer
description:
About the Role

You’ll be working with our Customer Experience team in Australia, handling customer enquiries across phone, Live Chat, and Salesforce. You’ll help manage orders, resolve customer issues, and make sure every interaction is handled quickly, accurately, and professionally. You’ll also support credit claims, maintain system updates, and work closely with internal teams to deliver a smooth customer experience.



Key Responsibilities



• Manage inbound customer enquiries via phone, Live Chat, and Salesforce

• Provide accurate information on orders, deliveries, products, and services

• Keep customers updated on order progress, delays, or issues

• Log all customer interactions and updates in Salesforce

• Investigate and resolve delivery issues, missing stock, and product queries

• Work with Warehouse, Sales, and Logistics teams to resolve issues quickly

• Raise and process credit claims accurately and on time

• Maintain clear case notes and follow internal processes

• Identify recurring issues and suggest improvements

• Support team KPIs and work closely with the Customer Experience team



What You Need



• Experience in a customer service or customer experience role

• Great English communication skills (written and spoken)

• Strong attention to detail and time management

• Able to multitask and handle competing priorities

• Problem-solving mindset and proactive approach

• Experience using CRM systems (Salesforce preferred)

• Ability to work independently and as part of a team



If you’re customer-focused, reliable, and ready to be part of a great team, we’d love to hear from you!



Please send your resume and a short cover letter telling us why you’re a great fit.

title: Amazon FBA Wholesale Buyer – Experienced Only
description:
Amazon FBA Wholesale Buyer - Remote  |  Full-time  |  Amazon FBA Wholesale



We're looking for an experienced Amazon FBA Wholesale Buyer to join our remote team. In this role, you'll own the buying process end-to-end — from scanning wholesale catalogs and evaluating profitability to creating clean purchase orders and tracking performance. If you're fluent in Keepa, RevSeller, and Amazon Seller Central, we'd love to hear from you.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

-Analyze product profitability using RevSeller, Keepa, and similar tools to make confident purchasing decisions.

-Assess sales rank, pricing history, sales velocity, and competition to evaluate buying opportunities.

-Scan wholesale catalogs and price lists to identify profitable SKUs and create accurate, well-organized purchase orders.

-Maintain and update tracking sheets and reports in Google Sheets/Excel.

-Manage tasks, priorities, and projects through ClickUp.

-Source wholesale items with a focus on healthy margins, strong sell-through, and brand/compliance alignment.





REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

-3+ years of experience in Amazon FBA wholesale buying or product sourcing.

-Proven experience analyzing vendor catalogs and data to identify profitable buying opportunities.

-Strong understanding of RevSeller, Keepa, and similar tools to evaluate profitability and sales history.

-Demonstrated ability to scan catalogs, shortlist products, and execute purchase orders accurately.

-High proficiency in Google Sheets/Excel (filters, basic formulas, sorting, etc.) and strong overall tech savvy.

-Experience using ClickUp (or similar project management tools) to manage daily work.

-Track record of sourcing profitable wholesale products for Amazon FBA.

-Strong communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with a remote team.



Bonus Skills

Experience with TPP and Source Correct is a plus 



HOW TO APPLY

Fill out the application form:



1. Inside the form, please include a 5–10 minute Loom video where you:

2. Show how you use Keepa and RevSeller (or similar tools) to d
 if a product is a good buy.

3. Briefly walk through how you would scan a wholesale catalog and shortlist products.

title: SEO Content Editor & Ghostwriter (Native-Level US English, WordPress, Internal Linking)
description:
We’re seeking a talented SEO Content Editor and Ghostwriter to bring fresh energy and expertise to our Florida-based website.



If you’re looking to truly make a difference—rather than just posting more articles—you’ll find this role rewarding. Our goal is to build on what we have, not start over.



We already have:



* 18 published blog articles

* Around 30 existing pages

* One article cluster that is linked correctly (French Toast)

* Several other articles and service pages that still need:

  * stronger human tone

  * better internal linking

  * clearer topical structure

  * better connection between blog content and service pages



Our first priority is to improve the existing content.



Main Responsibilities:



* Audit existing blog posts and key pages.

* Refresh or lightly refine our content so it sounds natural, warm, and genuinely American in tone.

* Improve internal linking across existing pages and articles.

* Spot weak content and recommend linking, expanding, repositioning, or new support.

* Use our existing spreadsheet and keep all work organized in one system.

* Suggest new content only when necessary, and only with clear reasoning.



Important Rules:



* Do not make major structural changes without approval.

* Prioritize improving current content over suggesting significant new content volumes.

* AI support is fine, but the writing must feel human and natural.



Requirements:



* Native-level US English

* Strong experience editing existing SEO content

* Strong internal linking skills

* Experience with WordPress

* Ability to write in a human, conversational, non-robotic tone

* Good judgment about what content should be improved first



Deliverables:



* Content audit spreadsheet

* Internal linking recommendations

* Revised article samples

* List of isolated or weak pages/articles with recommended action

* Limited, prioritized content gap suggestions



Please Answer:



1. How would you improve internal linking on a site with existing articles and service pages?

2. How do you humanize an SEO article without hurting rankings?

3. How do you d
 whether a piece of content should be updated, expanded, or left alone?

4. What tools do you personally use for content audits and internal linking?



Paid Test:

Please rewrite 300–500 words from one existing article in a more natural and engaging tone.

Also, suggest 5 internal links you would add, including anchor text and reason for each.
